prompts.text:
创建一张写实的 3:4 纵向图像：一个由九张等大肖像面板组成的整洁 3x3 拼图，一套俏皮的面包主题自拍。使用上传的肖像照片作为人物身份和发型的严格参考。保留其极具辨识度的面部结构：鹅蛋脸、深邃温暖的棕色大眼、柔和的平直眉、自然的巧鼻、温柔的双唇、年轻干净的面庞、自然的皮肤纹理以及平静甜美的表情。保留肖像中的发型：深棕至黑色长发，柔和中分，脸侧有零星碎发，两根长辫子垂在双肩。不要出现侧发髻、低发髻、波波头、短发、红色假发或不同的刘海。

在九个面板中，保持人物身份和双辫发型不变，仅改变姿势、服装细节和面包道具。面包主题配饰与道具包括：吐司帽、牛角包发带、甜甜圈发带、椒盐脆饼发带、法棍印花奶油色卫衣、超大圆形面包道具、微型菠萝包发夹、小型叶状面包冠、蓬松的面包奶油枕头场景。简约室内奶油色墙壁背景，柔和米色房间，可爱的韩系/日系社交媒体自拍美学，柔和的前置人像光，温暖的奶油与烤面包色调，高精细的面包皮纹理，亮泽自然妆容，长睫毛，红润脸颊，柔粉色嘴唇。混合特写自拍与半身姿势：眨眼、剪刀手、托腮、嘟嘴、交叉双臂、举手过头。细长的网格边界，光影统一，无文字。

items.title: 电影质感都市摩登女性人像特写

prompts.text:
Generate a high-quality, cinematic close-up portrait of a young woman inspired by the uploaded reference image. The scene is captured at eye level with a shallow depth of field, keeping the subject in sharp focus while the urban background melts into a soft architectural blur.

Subject Details:
The woman has short, messy black bob hair with soft textured waves moving naturally in the wind. Her skin is smooth with subtle freckles and a soft matte finish. She has defined eyebrows, long lashes, and naturally full lips with nude peach lipstick. She is wearing matte black round-framed sunglasses with a subtle silver “H” logo on the temples. The lenses are dark with slight reflections of the outdoor environment.

She wears medium-sized gold hoop earrings, a minimal gold pendant necklace, a black ribbed turtleneck sweater, and an oversized cream-beige trench coat with soft fabric texture. Her expression is calm, confident, and slightly mysterious, with her face turned slightly toward the light source.

Lighting and Color:
Natural directional sunlight comes strongly from the right side of the frame, creating dramatic side-lighting. Deep shadows fall across the left side of her face and neck while highlights emphasize the texture of her skin, lips, hair strands, and cheekbones. The image uses a moody cinematic teal-and-orange color grade with deep charcoal blacks, warm skin tones, muted cream colors, and soft amber bokeh lights in the background.

Environment and Composition:
The setting suggests a modern urban building entrance with blurred vertical metal frames, glass panels, and soft reflections visible behind her. A metallic pillar or handle appears on the left edge of the frame. The atmosphere feels luxurious, contemporary, and editorial. Add realistic film grain and soft texture for a gritty cinematic aesthetic.

Photography Style:
Ultra-realistic, editorial fashion photography, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look, high detail skin texture, realistic lighting, cinematic composition, luxury magazine aesthetic, natural shadows, soft bokeh, realistic fabric folds, photorealistic, 4K quality.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
生成一张受所提供的参考图启发的高质量、电影感女性近景人像。场景采用平视视角，浅景深效果，主体聚焦清晰，背景的都市建筑呈现柔和虚化。

主体细节：
女子留着凌乱的黑色短发波波头，带有在风中自然飘动的纹理波浪。皮肤细腻，带有细微雀斑和柔和哑光质感。眉毛清晰，睫毛浓密，双唇自然丰盈，涂抹着裸桃色口红。她戴着哑光黑色圆框墨镜，镜腿上有细微的银色“H”标志。镜片颜色深邃，略微反射出户外环境。

她戴着中等大小的金圆环耳坠、简约的金质吊坠项链，身穿黑色螺纹高领毛衣和一件质地柔软的特大号乳白色风衣。表情冷静、自信且略带神秘感，面部微微转向光源。

光影与色彩：
自然定向光从画面右侧强劲射入，营造出戏剧性的侧光效果。面部和颈部左侧呈现深邃阴影，而高光部分则突显了皮肤纹理、唇部、发丝和颧骨。图像采用富有情绪感的电影级青橙色调（Teal and Orange），拥有深炭黑、暖肤色、柔和的乳白色以及背景中朦胧的琥珀色虚化光斑。

环境与构图：
背景暗示这是一个现代都市建筑入口，可以看到模糊的垂直金属框架、玻璃面板和柔和的反光。画面左侧边缘出现金属柱或把手。整体氛围奢华、现代且具有杂志大片感。添加写实的电影胶片颗粒和柔和纹理，以营造质感细腻的电影美学。

摄影风格：
超写实，时尚编辑摄影，浅景深，85mm镜头感，高精皮肤纹理，真实光影，电影化构图，奢侈品杂志美学，自然阴影，柔和虚化，真实的织物褶皱，光线追踪，4K画质。

items.title: 高级感内衣套装时尚提案画板

prompts.text:
Create a high-end horizontal 4:3 “AI Innerwear Set Styling Board” in a premium fashion proposal / editorial lookbook style.

Theme Name: [USER INPUT]
Main Color Palette: [USER INPUT]
Style Direction: [USER INPUT]
Usage Scene: [USER INPUT]
Material Direction: [USER INPUT]

If a reference image is provided:

- Image A = lingerie style / color inspiration
- Image B = female model reference (optional)

If no model reference is provided, generate an attractive adult Chinese female model with a soft mature feminine appearance, natural beauty, elegant posture, long hair, light makeup, and a refined luxury fashion vibe.

The overall board should feel:
Elegant • Feminine • Fashion Editorial • Premium • Sophisticated • Non-sexualized • Brand Proposal Style

---

TITLE AREA
At the top, clearly display:

- Main title: AI Innerwear Set Styling Board
- Subtitle: Premium Lingerie Styling Concept
- Theme name
- A short elegant description about color, materials, silhouette, and styling direction.

Use clean typography with luxury branding aesthetics.

---

LEFT SIDE — MAIN MODEL SHOWCASE
Feature a full-body or near full-body adult Chinese female model wearing the complete lingerie set.

Requirements:

- Natural and elegant pose
- No erotic posing
- No bedroom/hotel/bathroom scene
- Clean studio-like background
- Premium lingerie styling
- Can include stockings, garter belt, heels, silk robe, oversized shirt, or cardigan for styling balance

Focus on:

- Overall silhouette
- Fabric texture
- Color harmony
- Realistic wearable fashion feeling

---

CENTER — PRODUCT BREAKDOWN
Show organized flat-lay product breakdowns including:

- Bra
- Panty
- Garter Belt
- Stockings
- Lace close-up
- Embroidery detail
- Strap & hardware detail

All pieces must match the model outfit in color and design language.

The layout should resemble a luxury fashion product board, with clean spacing, close-up material shots, stitching details, lace texture, mesh transparency, and metallic accessories.

---

RIGHT SIDE — STYLING INFORMATION PANEL

Include premium infographic-style modules:

A. Style Theme
Describe the overall vibe such as:
French elegance, black luxury aesthetic, vintage feminine, midnight glamour, soft mature romance, etc.

B. Color Palette
Show 5–6 color swatches including:
Primary color, secondary color, accent tone, metallic tone, nude balance tone, soft transition shades.

C. Material Board
Display materials such as:
Lace, mesh, satin, elastic fabric, ribbon, soft lining, metal hardware.

D. Fit & Features
Use stylish labels:
Soft support, adjustable straps, comfortable fit, medium coverage, premium detailing, lightweight feel, elegant layering.

E. Occasion Fit
Show suitable scenes:
Daily luxury, romantic styling, holiday gifting, home elegance, shirt layering, robe styling.

---

HANDWRITTEN NOTES
Add subtle handwritten Chinese notes, arrows, hearts, stars, or circle annotations across the board for a fashionable “social media recommendation” feeling.

Keep them minimal, elegant, and integrated into the layout.

---

BOTTOM — STYLING MATCH STRIP
Show 3 styling extension ideas:

Look 01 — Silk Robe Styling
Look 02 — Oversized White Shirt Styling
Look 03 — Blazer or Knit Cardigan Styling

Each look should include a small visual thumbnail and short styling keywords.

---

FINAL NOTE
Add a clean luxury summary sentence at the bottom:
“This concept combines lingerie aesthetics, materials, silhouette, and styling versatility into a complete premium innerwear proposal.”

VISUAL STYLE:
Luxury lingerie brand board • Fashion editorial • High-information design layout • Chinese social-media aesthetic • Premium lookbook • Sophisticated neutral background • Beige / ivory / soft gray tones • Fine lines • Minimal labels • Elegant infographic composition.

prompts.text:
创建一个高端横版 4:3 “AI 内衣套装搭配展示板”，采用高级时尚提案 / 编辑部画册风格。

主题名称：[用户输入]
主色调：[用户输入]
风格方向：[用户输入]
使用场景：[用户输入]
材质方向：[用户输入]

如果有参考图：
- 图片 A = 内衣款式 / 色彩灵感
- 图片 B = 女性模特参考（可选）

如果没有提供模特参考，请生成一位极具吸引力的成年中国女性模特，具有柔美成熟的女性外表、自然的美感、优雅的姿态、长发、淡妆，以及精致的奢侈时尚氛围。

整体画板应体现：
优雅 • 女性化 • 时尚社论 • 高端 • 精致 • 非性暗示 • 品牌提案风格

---

标题区域
在顶部清晰显示：
- 主标题：AI Innerwear Set Styling Board
- 副标题：Premium Lingerie Styling Concept
- 主题名称
- 关于颜色、材质、轮廓和造型方向的简短优雅描述。

使用具有奢侈品牌美学的整洁排版。

---

左侧 —— 主模特展示
展示一位穿着成套内衣的成年中国女性模特全身或近全身照。

要求：
- 自然优雅的姿态
- 无诱导性姿势
- 非卧室/酒店/浴室场景
- 干净的类似影棚的背景
- 高端内衣造型
- 可包括丝袜、吊袜带、高跟鞋、真丝睡袍、大号衬衫或开衫以平衡造型

重点在于：
- 整体轮廓
- 面料质感
- 色彩和谐
- 写实的时尚实穿感

---

中间 —— 产品拆解
展示有组织的平铺产品拆解，包括：
- 文胸
- 内裤
- 吊袜带
- 丝袜
- 蕾丝近景
- 刺绣细节
- 肩带与五金细节

所有单品必须在颜色和设计语言上与模特穿着的套装匹配。
布局应类似于奢侈时尚产品看板，间距整洁，包含材质特写、缝线细节、蕾丝纹理、网眼透明度和金属配饰。

---

右侧 —— 造型信息面板

包含高级信息图风格的模块：

A. 风格主题
描述整体氛围，如：法式优雅、黑色奢华美学、复古柔美、午夜魅力、轻熟浪漫等。

B. 调色盘
展示 5–6 个色块，包括：主色、辅助色、点缀色、金属色、肤色平衡色、柔和过渡色。

C. 材质板
展示材质，如：蕾丝、网眼、缎面、弹力面料、丝带、柔软衬里、金属五金。

D. 版型与特点
使用时尚的标签：柔和支撑、可调节肩带、舒适贴合、中等覆盖、高级细节、轻盈质感、优雅层搭。

E. 场合适配
展示适用场景：日常奢华、浪漫造型、节日礼赠、居家优雅、衬衫叠穿、睡袍造型。

---

手写笔记
在画板上添加细微的手写中文备注、箭头、爱心、星星或圆圈标注，营造时尚的“社交媒体推荐”感。
保持极简、优雅，并融入整体布局。

---

底部 —— 造型搭配条
展示 3 个造型延伸方案：
Look 01 —— 真丝睡袍造型
Look 02 —— 大号白衬衫造型
Look 03 —— 西装或针织开衫造型
每个造型应包括一个小缩略图和简短的造型关键词。

---

最终注释
在底部添加一句整洁的奢侈感总结陈词：
“此方案将内衣美学、材质、轮廓和造型多样性整合为一套完整的高端内衣提案。”

视觉风格：
奢侈内衣品牌画板 • 时尚社论 • 高信息量设计布局 • 中国社交媒体审美 • 高级 Lookbook • 精致的中性背景 • 米色 / 象牙色 / 柔和灰色调 • 细腻线条 • 极简标签 • 优雅的信息图构图。

items.title: 日式书写商铺字标Logo设计

prompts.text:
Based on the user's input [Brand Name / Project Name], [Type / Industry], [Brand Positioning], [Core Keywords], [Emotional Tone], [Layout Direction], [Main Color], [Secondary Color], and [Aspect Ratio], design a high-quality 'Japanese Brush Shop Wordmark.'

Note: The goal is a commercially viable shop logo, not just general typography, poster titles, or pure calligraphy art. Focus on a brush-written feel, ensuring the main text has distinct variations in stroke thickness, press and lift techniques, subtle 'flying white' (dry brush) effects, and natural brush movement, while maintaining high legibility and recognition.

[Main Text Requirements]
1. Use the brand name as the core subject, treated with a handwritten brush feel.
2. Strokes should exhibit clear thickness variation, rhythm, subtle dry-brush textures, ink density, and a sense of 'breathing.'
3. Certain key strokes can be moderately exaggerated to create a memorable focal point.
4. The font style does not need to be rigid or standard; it can incorporate natural deformation and shop-specific personality.
5. The focus is on a 'commercial shop wordmark,' not a traditional calligraphic exhibition piece.

The overall vibe should be that of an authentic Japanese shopfront, signage, or noren (curtain). Discreetly include elements like small red seals, small vertical explanatory text, minimal Kana/Pinyin/English, or red-on-white blocks for embellishment. Keep the background clean so the main logo stands out. The final result should look like a high-recognition wordmark ready for use by a real Japanese restaurant, Izakaya, tea house, cafeteria, or Japanese lifestyle brand.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
请根据用户输入的【品牌名 / 项目名】【类型 / 行业】【品牌定位】【核心关键词】【情绪气质】【版式方向】【主色调】【辅助色】【画幅比例】，设计一个高完成度的「日式书写商铺字标 / Japanese Brush Shop Wordmark」。

注意：这次要做的是一个真正可商用的店铺 Logo，而不是普通字体排版、海报标题或纯书法作品。请以毛笔书写感为核心，让主体文字具有明显粗细变化、提按顿挫、轻微飞白和自然笔势，同时保持清晰可读和强识别度。

【主体文字要求】
1. 以品牌名为核心主体，字形采用毛笔手写感处理；
2. 笔画应有明显粗细变化、提按顿挫、轻微飞白、墨感和呼吸感；
3. 某些关键笔画可适度夸张，形成记忆点；
4. 字体风格不必规整标准，可略带自然变形和店招个性；
5. 重点是“商铺书写字标”，不要做成传统书法展作品。

整体要有明显的和风商铺 / 门头招牌 / 暖帘店招气质，可适度加入小红印章、小号竖排说明字、少量假名 / 拼音 / 英文、红底白字块等元素作为点缀，但必须克制。背景保持简洁，主体 Logo 清晰突出。最终结果应像一家真实日料店、居酒屋、茶菓铺、食堂或和风生活方式品牌可以直接使用的高识别字标。

items.title: 3D写实历史人物传记破框视觉海报

prompts.text:
Create a highly detailed “3D Historical Breakout Biography Poster”.

Main Character: [INSERT CHARACTER NAME]
Character Identity: [Emperor / General / Strategist / Philosopher / Reformer / Scholar / Military Leader]
Historical Era: [INSERT DYNASTY OR HISTORICAL PERIOD]
Core Keywords: [INSERT KEYWORDS]
Main Color Palette: [Black Gold Crimson / Deep Blue Silver / Dark Ink Gold / Iron Black]
Aspect Ratio: 3:4 Vertical Poster

Design an ultra cinematic historical archive-style poster with a full-body 3D historical figure as the absolute center focus. The character must appear realistic, monument-like, powerful, and historically accurate with strong cinematic presence. Clothing, armor, robes, weapons, crown, boots, fabric textures, and accessories must accurately match the historical era.

The figure should not stand still. Create a dramatic “breaking out of the frame” action pose toward the viewer with strong cinematic depth and perspective distortion. One arm or symbolic object must extend forward aggressively. The breakout object can be an imperial sword, spear, command scroll, royal decree, military token, book scroll, jade tablet, ceremonial weapon, or dynasty banner. Keep the forward object fully visible and uncropped.

The central figure stands on a refined memorial-style base with subtle historical engravings. The figure should feel visually heavy and dominant while the surrounding information system feels light, elegant, transparent, and floating.

Around the character, place 6–10 floating historical event fragments designed like lightweight museum archive shards instead of thick information cards. Use transparent acrylic/glass panels, glowing borders, fine gold annotation lines, layered infographic fragments, and floating manuscript textures. These fragments may contain years, event titles, short annotations, historical scenes, military maps, dynasty seals, territory outlines, and ancient document textures.

The floating fragments should appear at different depths and angles. Some closer to the camera, some partially hidden behind armor or weapons, creating strong cinematic layering and realistic spatial depth.

On the left side, include a large East Asian calligraphy-style title composition featuring the character’s name, birth/death years, dynasty name, role labels, historical keywords, and legendary subtitle with seal-style typography.

At the bottom, create a thin elegant horizontal timeline using fine gold lines, small circular markers, minimal year labels, and subtle annotations inspired by museum exhibition guides. Avoid heavy information bars.

Background style should combine ancient parchment textures, faded maps, museum wall aesthetics, ink textures, seal stamps, fragmented historical documents, war strategy sketches, dust particles, volumetric fog, ember glow, and dynasty-inspired patterns.

Lighting should be ultra cinematic with volumetric atmosphere, dramatic rim lighting, museum spotlight illumination, realistic reflections, high contrast shadows, and soft haze. The central figure must feel sculptural and powerful while the floating archive fragments remain refined and lightweight.

Style Tags:
Ultra cinematic historical archive poster, hyper detailed 3D sculpture, realistic historical armor and costume, floating history fragments, dramatic volumetric lighting, museum exhibition aesthetic, broken frame composition, epic atmosphere, masterpiece quality, ultra realistic, 8K, historical fantasy realism, AAA cinematic poster quality..

历史时期：[插入朝代或历史时期]
核心关键词：[插入关键词]
主色调：[黑金绯红 / 深蓝银色 / 暗墨金 / 铁黑]
纵横比：3:4 垂直海报

设计一张极具电影感的历史档案风格海报，以全身3D历史人物为绝对视觉中心。人物必须表现得写实、如纪念碑般雄伟、充满力量感，且符合历史事实，具备强烈的电影存在感。服装、盔甲、长袍、武器、冠冕、靴子、面料纹理和配饰必须准确还原其所属的历史时代。

人物不应是静止的。创作一个充满戏剧性的、向观众冲来的“破框”动作，具备强烈的电影感深度和透视畸变。一只手臂或象征性物体必须极具侵略性地向前延伸。破框物体可以是御剑、长矛、军令卷轴、皇室诏书、兵符、书卷、玉牌、礼器或朝代旗帜。保持前方物体完全可见且不被裁剪。

中心人物站在一个精制的纪念碑式基座上，带有微妙的历史雕刻。人物在视觉上应具有厚重感和主导地位，而周围的信息系统则感觉轻盈、优雅、透明且具有漂浮感。

在人物周围放置6–10个漂浮的历史事件碎片，设计得像轻量级的博物馆档案碎片，而非厚重的信息卡片。使用透明亚克力/玻璃面板、发光边界、精细的金色注释线、分层的信息图表碎片和漂浮的手稿纹理。这些碎片可能包含年份、事件标题、简短注释、历史场景、军事地图、朝代印章、领土轮廓和古代文献纹理。

漂浮碎片应出现在不同的深度和角度。有的靠近摄像机，有的部分隐藏在盔甲或武器后面，营造出强烈的电影分层感和真实的视觉空间深度。

左侧包含一个大型东亚书法风格的标题组合，包含人物姓名、生卒年份、朝代名称、角色标签、历史关键词以及带有印章风格排版的传奇副标题。

底部使用精细的线条创建一个优雅的水平时间线，使用细金线、小圆形标记、极简的年份标签和灵感来自博物馆展览指南的微妙注释。避免使用沉重的信息栏。

背景风格应结合古老的羊皮纸纹理、褪色的地图、博物馆墙壁美学、水墨纹理、封印印章、破碎的历史文档、战争策略草图、尘埃颗粒、体积雾、余烬光芒以及受朝代启发的图案。

光影应具备极致的电影感，带有体积大气、戏剧性的边缘光、博物馆射灯照明、真实的反射、高对比度阴影和柔和的薄雾。中心人物必须具有雕塑感和力量感，而漂浮的档案碎片则保持精致和轻盈。

风格标签：
极高电影感历史档案海报，超细节3D雕塑，写实历史盔甲与服饰，漂浮历史碎片，戏剧性体积光，博物馆展览美学，破框构图，史诗氛围，大师级品质，超写实，8K，历史奇幻现实主义，AAA级电影海报品质。

items.title: 极简主义瑞士平面设计城市旅游海报

prompts.text:
Create an ultra-high-resolution typography-based travel poster design themed around [CITY NAME].

Aspect ratio: (16:9 poster)

IMPORTANT:

All visible text inside the poster must be in English only.

Typography must be perfectly spelled and professionally typeset.

Absolutely no distorted letters, random symbols, broken text, or AI-generated gibberish.

Aspect ratio: 16:9 poster

CORE COMPOSITION:

Place the giant English word “[CITY_NAME]” prominently in the center of the composition

Each individual letter should contain a different illustrated scene from the city

Letters should be tall, elongated, bold sans-serif forms

The typography itself should feel like a series of “city gallery windows”

Distribute landmarks, streets, transportation, nature, culture, and architecture naturally across the letters

Scenes should visually flow from one letter into another like one connected urban panorama

TOP HORIZONTAL STRIP:
At the top of the poster, include a thin panoramic horizontal strip containing:

city skyline silhouettes

cars

trams or trains

boats if relevant

birds

clouds

sun
All elements should appear minimalist, elegant, and rhythmically balanced.

STYLE:
mid-century modern editorial poster,
Swiss graphic design,
minimal vector illustration,
architectural infographic aesthetic,
travel typography poster,
flat geometric illustration,
ultra clean composition,
premium magazine design,
screen print poster feeling,
retro-futuristic travel branding

ILLUSTRATION STYLE:

flat vector shapes only

no realism

no gradients

no texture noise

clean geometric shadows

simplified architectural forms

map-like top-down illustration mixed with side-view cityscape

subtle line-art details

perfectly clean vector edges

strong negative space usage

harmonious visual rhythm between letters

TYPOGRAPHY:

giant bold sans-serif typography

letters occupy most of the canvas height

ultra precise alignment

each letter acts as an independent framed illustration panel

smooth rounded corners where appropriate

editorial spacing

highly balanced composition

typography must look professionally designed, print-ready, and geometrically perfect

COLOR PALETTE:
Automatically derive a cohesive palette inspired by [CITY_NAME].

Examples:

coastal city → aqua, sand, coral, muted teal

desert city → terracotta, beige, warm cream

cyber city → mint, navy, steel blue

historic European city → dusty rose, olive green, parchment

Use:

muted pastel tones

soft vintage travel poster colors

elegant low-saturation combinations

maximum 4–6 colors only

CONTENT GENERATION:
Automatically include:

iconic landmarks of [CITY_NAME]

famous streets and transportation

local urban patterns

nearby nature elements

skyline silhouettes

bridges, rivers, or coastline if relevant

culturally symbolic architecture

recognizable local atmosphere

COMPOSITION:

centered typography composition

white or soft ivory background

lots of breathing room

top panoramic strip balances the heavy typography below

asymmetrical but visually balanced layout

each letter contains different scene depth and perspective

premium poster hierarchy with museum-quality layout

MOOD:
premium,
intellectual,
calm,
design-forward,
travel editorial aesthetic,
stylish enough for a museum gift shop poster

QUALITY:
8K ultra detailed,
print-ready,
extremely sharp vector edges,
perfect typography rendering,
clean professional graphic design,
high-end editorial poster quality,
no distorted text,
no random characters,
no spelling errors,
no AI artifacts
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
创建一个以 [城市名称] 为主题的超高分辨率排版旅游海报设计。

宽高比：16:9 海报

重要说明：
海报内所有可见文本必须仅为英文。排版必须拼写完美且经过专业排版。绝对不允许出现扭曲的字母、随机符号、断裂文本或 AI 生成的乱码。

核心构图：
将巨大的英文单词“[CITY_NAME]”醒目地置于构图中心。每个字母内应包含不同的城市插画场景。字母应采用高大、拉长、粗体的无衬线字体。排版本身应感觉像是一系列“城市画廊窗口”。将地标、街道、交通、自然、文化和建筑自然地分布在字母中。场景应视觉化地从一个字母流向另一个字母，如同一个连贯的城市全景。

顶部水平条带：
在海报顶部包含一个细长的全景水平条带，内含：城市天际线剪影、汽车、电车或火车、相关的船只、鸟类、云、太阳。所有元素应显得简约、优雅且富有节奏感。

风格：
世纪中期现代社论海报、瑞士平面设计、极简矢量插画、建筑信息图美学、旅游排版海报、扁平几何插画、极净构图、高端杂志设计、丝网印刷海报感、复古未来主义旅游品牌。

插画风格：
仅限扁平矢量形状，不使用写实主义，无渐变，无纹理噪点，干净的几何阴影，简化的建筑形式，地图式俯瞰插画与侧视城市景观结合，细腻的线稿细节，完美干净的矢量边缘，强大的负空间运用，字母间和谐的视觉节奏。

排版：
巨大的粗体无衬线排版，字母占据画布大部分高度，极度精确的对齐，每个字母作为独立的框架插画版面，在适当位置采用平滑的圆角，社论级间距，高度平衡的构图。排版必须看起来经过专业设计、可供印刷且几何完美。

调色板：
自动推导受 [城市名称] 启发的协调色调。例如：沿海城市 → 水蓝色、沙子色、珊瑚色、柔和鸭翅绿；沙漠城市 → 赤陶色、米色、暖奶油色；赛博城市 → 薄荷色、海军蓝、钢蓝色；历史悠久的欧洲城市 → 灰玫瑰色、橄榄绿、羊皮纸色。使用：柔和的粉彩色调、柔和的复古旅游海报色彩、优雅的低饱和度组合、最多仅使用 4-6 种颜色。

内容生成：
自动包含：[城市名称] 的标志性地标、著名街道和交通工具、当地城市纹理、周边的自然元素、天际线剪影、相关的桥梁、河流或海岸线、具有文化象征意义的建筑、可识别的当地氛围。

构图：
居中排版构图，白色或柔和的象牙色背景，充足的呼吸空间，顶部全景条带平衡下方厚重的排版，非对称但视觉平衡的布局，每个字母包含不同的场景深度和透视，具有博物馆品质布局的高端海报层级。

氛围：
高端、理智、冷静、设计领先、旅游社论美学、风格时尚足以作为博物馆礼品店海报。

质量：
8K 超细节、可直接印刷、极其锐利的矢量边缘、完美的排版渲染、干净专业的平面设计、高端社论海报品质、无扭曲文本、无随机字符、无拼写错误、无 AI 瑕疵。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 加缪荒诞主义皮克斯风格潮玩3D角色插画

prompts.text:
Create a high-resolution vertical 3D character illustration in a stylized Pixar-meets-designer-toy aesthetic.

Main character:
Absurdism — Albert Camus — depicted as a tall, slim, slightly exaggerated Pixar-style 3D character.
Maintain Albert Camus’ iconic facial features: sharp contemplative eyes, slicked-back dark hair, cigarette-era French intellectual aura, calm detached facial expression, minimalist trench coat, and understated existential elegance — translated into clean, simplified designer-toy proportions with refined geometric stylization.
The figure must remain instantly recognizable in full-body view, embodying philosophical isolation, quiet rebellion, and existential intelligence.
Pose:
Albert Camus stands alone in a subtly theatrical pose, one hand inside his trench coat pocket while the other loosely holds a cigarette near his side.
His posture is relaxed yet emotionally distant, head tilted slightly downward as if observing the absurdity of existence itself.
The pose should communicate detachment, introspection, rebellion against meaninglessness, and calm acceptance of chaos.
Background:
Use a bold, high-saturation sun-scorched amber-orange background inspired by the harsh Algerian sun, existential heat, emotional emptiness, and the surreal beauty of absurd existence.
The atmosphere should feel psychologically warm yet spiritually isolating.
The wall is flat vivid burnt amber-orange with a slightly darker rust-orange reflective floor.
No gradients. No realistic scenery. No dull cinematic gray.
The environment should feel infinite, minimal, graphic, and philosophically theatrical — like a conceptual existentialist gallery poster.
Lighting:
Use one strong directional spotlight from the upper-left side.
The light creates a massive sharp-edged symbolic shadow stretching dramatically across both the wall and floor.
Lighting should feel graphic, sculptural, cinematic, and psychologically symbolic.

Key Concept – Shadow as spiritual projection:
The shadow behind Albert Camus must NOT resemble his human silhouette.
Instead, the shadow transforms into a monumental symbolic projection of Absurdism itself.
The shadow becomes:
A gigantic endless looping staircase spiraling upward into nothingness, merging with floating boulders, fragmented suns, repeating doorways, collapsing clocks without hands, and infinite geometric corridors dissolving into empty space.
The shadow should feel surreal, philosophical, poetic, emotionally infinite, and existentially unsettling — symbolizing humanity’s endless search for meaning in an indifferent universe.
Subtle visual echoes of Sisyphus pushing a boulder uphill may emerge abstractly within the shadow composition.
The symbolic projection dominates the entire composition and acts as the emotional and conceptual soul of the poster.
Typography:
Render the main title text:
ABSURDISM
Use a refined elegant serif font in uppercase with clean spacing and gallery-style hierarchy.
Place the typography in the top-left corner with strong poster composition.
Smaller secondary text beneath may read:
“Albert Camus”
in understated minimalist typography.

Rendering:
Pixar-style 3D rendering with designer-toy influence:
soft sculpted forms, matte textures, simplified geometry, cinematic clarity, premium visual polish, and subtle artistic film grain.
Keep the character stylized yet unmistakably recognizable as Albert Camus.
Avoid unnecessary props or visual clutter.
Composition:
Strong conceptual poster composition with dramatic negative space.
Albert Camus occupies one grounded visual anchor point while the overwhelming symbolic shadow expands across most of the frame.
The contrast between the quiet human figure and the infinite existential projection should immediately communicate:
“this is not simply a portrait of a philosopher, but a portrait of the human condition projected outward.”
Mood:
Existential, poetic, philosophical, surreal, melancholic, symbolic, intellectually powerful, emotionally infinite, and visually unforgettable.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
创建一张高分辨率的竖版3D角色插画，采用皮克斯融合设计师玩具的艺术风格。

主角：
荒诞主义——阿尔贝·加缪——被描绘成一个身材高挑、苗条、略显夸张的皮克斯风格3D角色。保留加缪标志性的面部特征：深邃忧郁的眼神、向后梳理的深色头发、香烟时代的法国知识分子气质、冷静超脱的面部表情、极简主义风衣以及低调的超然优雅——并将其转化为简洁、简化的具有精细几何美感的设计师玩具比例。人像在全身视图中必须极具辨识度，体现哲学上的孤独、寂静的叛逆和存在主义智慧。

姿态：
加缪独自站立，姿势略显戏剧化，一只手插在风衣口袋里，另一只手在身体一侧松松地夹着一支烟。他的姿态放松却带着疏离感，头微微低垂，仿佛在观察存在本身的荒谬。这一姿势应传达出超脱、内省、对无意义的抗争以及对混沌的平静接受。

背景：
使用受阿尔及利亚烈日启发的大胆、高饱和度的焦橙色背景，象征着存在主义的热度、情感的空虚和荒谬存在的超现实之美。氛围应兼具心理上的温暖与精神上的孤立。墙面为鲜艳的平铺烧橙色，地板为略深的锈橙色反射面。无渐变。无写实布景。无沉闷的电影感灰色。环境应具有无限感、极简感、图形化且带有哲学的戏剧性——如同概念性的存在主义画廊海报。

灯光：
从左上方使用一束强烈的定向聚光灯。灯光在墙壁和地板上投射出巨大的、边缘锐利的象征性阴影，并剧烈拉伸。光影应具有图形感、雕塑感、电影感和心理象征意义。

核心概念——阴影作为精神投射：
加缪身后的阴影绝不能只是他的人影轮廓。相反，阴影转化为了“荒诞主义”本身的宏大象征。阴影变为：一个通往虚无的巨大无尽螺旋阶梯，与漂浮的巨石、破碎的太阳、重复的门廊、没有指针的崩塌时钟以及消散在虚空中的无限几何走廊融合在一起。阴影应具有超现实感、哲学性、诗意、情感上的无限性和存在主义的焦虑感——象征着人类在冷漠宇宙中对意义的无尽追寻。西西弗斯推石上山的视觉元素可以抽象地浮现在阴影构图中。这一象征性投射主导了整个构图，构成了海报的情感和概念核心。

排版：
渲染主标题文字：ABSURDISM。使用精致优雅的衬线字体，大写字母，间距整洁，具有画廊风格的层次感。将文字置于左上角，强化海报构图。下方的小副标题为：“Albert Camus”，采用低调的极简主义字体。

渲染：
皮克斯风格3D渲染，融入设计师玩具影响：柔和的雕刻形状、哑光质感、简化的几何体、电影级的清晰度、高级视觉质感和微妙的艺术胶片颗粒感。保持角色风格化的同时，确保一眼就能认出是阿尔贝·加缪。避免不必要的道具或视觉干扰。

构图：
具有强烈戏剧性留白的概念海报构图。加缪占据了一个稳定的视觉锚点，而压倒性的象征性阴影则占据了画面的大部分。安静的人物形象与无限的存在主义投影之间的对比应立即传达出：“这不仅是一张哲学家的肖像，更是向外投射的人类生存状态的缩影。”

氛围：
存在主义、诗意、哲学、超现实、忧郁、象征性、知识力量感、情感无限且视觉难忘。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 金色花海复古敞篷车高定礼服超写实大片

prompts.text:
Ultra-realistic cinematic fashion editorial photograph of a stunning young woman standing in the middle of an endless yellow wildflower field beside a vintage yellow convertible car. She has a sharp jawline, pale porcelain skin, short sleek black bob hair with a side part, piercing blue-grey eyes, bold matte red lips, soft glowing skin texture, and elegant facial features inspired by high-fashion European beauty editorials.

She wears an extravagant mustard-yellow couture tulle gown with dramatic layered ruffles, flowing fabric trails, fitted strapless corset bodice, luxurious textured details, and a sophisticated haute couture silhouette. The dress spreads elegantly across the flowers and grass, moving softly in the wind.

The woman poses confidently in a calm editorial stance, body slightly turned while looking directly into the camera with a dreamy, powerful expression. One hand gently touches her face while the other lightly holds the flowing gown. Minimal gold jewelry, long glossy black nails, luxury vogue-inspired styling, soft glamorous makeup with warm tones and defined eyes.

Behind her is a vintage yellow convertible parked naturally in the countryside landscape, roof down, blending perfectly with the warm yellow flower scenery. Golden hour sunlight, cinematic depth of field, soft breeze, highly detailed flowers and fabric texture, realistic shadows and highlights, photorealistic skin detail, DSLR quality, retro 1970s luxury campaign aesthetic, sophisticated cinematic color grading, ultra-sharp focus, magazine cover composition, elegant storytelling, Vogue editorial photography style, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, masterpiece quality.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
超写实电影感时尚社论摄影，一位惊艳的年轻女子站在无边无际的黄色野花丛中，身旁停着一辆复古黄色敞篷车。她拥有清晰的下颌线，苍白的瓷肌，侧分的利落黑色波波头，深邃的蓝灰色眼睛，醒目的哑光红唇，柔和发光的皮肤纹理，以及受欧洲高级时尚社论启发的优雅五官。

她身穿一件奢华的芥末黄高定薄纱长裙，配有夸张的分层褶边、流动的布料拖尾、修身的抹胸束腹、华丽的质感细节和精致的高级定制轮廓。礼服优雅地铺展在花丛和草地上，随风轻轻摆动。

女子以沉稳的社论姿势自信地站立，身体微侧，以梦幻而强大的表情直视镜头。一只手轻轻抚摸脸庞，另一只手轻提流动的长裙。极简金饰，亮黑色长指甲，奢华Vogue风格造型，色调温暖且眼部轮廓清晰的柔和魅力妆容。

身后停放着一辆复古黄色敞篷车，自然地融入乡村景观，顶篷开启，与温暖的黄色花海美景完美融合。黄金时段阳光，电影级景深，微风，细节精细的花朵和织物纹理，写实的阴影与高光，照片级的皮肤细节，单反画质，复古20世纪70年代奢华大片美学，精致的电影色彩分级，极高清晰度，杂志封面构图，优雅的叙事感，Vogue时尚摄影风格，85mm镜头，浅景深，大师级作品。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 现代清爽西瓜青柠饮品商业宣传海报

prompts.text:
Create a premium modern beverage promotional poster for We Drink.

TOPIC:

Watermelon Pink + Lime Green Refresh Campaign

STYLE & ART DIRECTION:
Modern energetic beverage advertising
Youthful commercial branding
Split-color background composition
Bright refreshing summer aesthetic
Minimal dynamic layout
High-contrast drink advertisement style
Instagram-ready beverage promotion
Premium fast-moving commercial design
MAIN SUBJECT:

Two large ultra-realistic cold beverages positioned prominently in the center.

Drink 1:

文字与排版：

prompts.text:
Create an ultra-detailed isometric illustrated travel map poster of [COUNTRY] in a luxurious editorial infographic style. Feature vibrant teal and deep ocean-blue surrounding waters with realistic light reflections, gentle wave textures, and cinematic depth. Design the country as a stylized 3D landmass viewed from an angled isometric perspective, filled with miniature landmarks, famous monuments, major cities, mountains, forests, lakes, beaches, and cultural attractions placed accurately by geography.
Include elegant bold white location badges for each destination, connected with subtle travel-route paths and tiny vehicles/boats for a dynamic exploration feel. Place the national flag of [COUNTRY] in the top-left corner with decorative framing. Add ornate vintage serif typography for the title, with luxurious gold emboss-style effects and layered ribbon banners in green, red, and gold tones for section headers. Surround the map with decorative side panels containing categorized travel highlights such as iconic cities, historical landmarks, natural wonders, local cuisine, festivals, hidden gems, and travel tips  each with small illustrated icons and short descriptions. Add a detailed compass rose in the bottom-right corner, subtle paper texture, atmospheric lighting, soft shadows, glowing highlights, and rich cinematic color grading.
Style should feel like a premium collectible travel poster mixed with a modern fantasy atlas and tourism magazine cover. Highly detailed digital illustration, immersive composition, editorial-quality rendering, clean layout, sharp textures, realistic depth, vibrant colors, and polished infographic aesthetics.
Aspect Ratio: 4:5 vertical composition.

prompts.text:
创建一个超详细的等距视角插图旅游地图海报，展示[国家]，采用豪华的编辑类信息图风格。特色是充满活力的青蓝色和深海蓝色环绕水域，带有写实的光影反射、轻柔的波纹纹理和电影般的深度感。将该国设计为从斜角等距视角观察的风格化3D陆块，其中充满了根据地理准确放置的微型地标、著名纪念碑、主要城市、山脉、森林、湖泊、海滩和文化景点。
为每个目的地添加优雅的大号白色位置标记，并通过微妙的旅行路线路径和微型车辆/船只连接，营造出动态的探索感。在左上角放置[国家]的国旗，并配有装饰性边框。为标题使用华丽的复古衬线字体，带有豪华的金色浮雕风格效果，以及绿色、红色和金色色调的分层丝带条幅作为各版块标题。在地图周围添加装饰性侧面板，包含分类旅游亮点，如标志性城市、历史地标、自然奇观、当地美食、节日、隐藏宝藏和旅行提示，每个都配有精美的小插图图标和简短描述。在右下角添加详细的罗盘玫瑰、细微的纸张纹理、大气照明、柔和的阴影、发光的高光和丰富的电影级调色。
风格应感觉像是高端收藏级旅游海报，融合了现代奇幻地图册和旅游杂志封面的质感。高度详细的数字插画，沉浸式构图，编辑级的渲染质量，整洁的布局，锐利的纹理，真实的深度，鲜艳的色彩以及精致的信息图美学。
纵横比：4:5 垂直构图。

items.title: 通用模块化木质拼装浮雕提示词

prompts.text:
UNIVERSAL “MODULAR WOOD BLOCK RELIEF SYSTEM” PROMPT (IDENTITY LOCK – STRICT)
Use the uploaded image as the subject and the only identity reference.
IDENTITY LOCK – STRICT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)
Preserve exact facial structure, proportions, and feature placement. Do not alter eyes, nose, mouth, or silhouette. Maintain expression and recognizability.
POSE & COMPOSITION – LOCKED
Keep original angle, framing, and perspective. No rotation, mirroring, or camera changes.
STYLE TRANSFORMATION – WOOD BLOCK RELIEF (HARD)
Transform the entire image into a densely packed carved wood construction:
Rebuild all forms (face, hair, clothing, background) using interlocking wooden blocks, rods, and carved segments.
Use a mix of rectangular beams, rounded dowels, sliced cross-sections, and stacked planks.
Maintain tight packing density with minimal gaps (no empty flat areas).
MATERIAL SYSTEM – WOOD (CRITICAL)
All elements must be realistic wood with visible grain, rings, and natural variation.
Grain direction must follow the form of each piece (no random textures).
Include cut ends, knots, and subtle imperfections.
Finish: matte to semi-matte natural wood (no plastic, no gloss).
DEPTH & STRUCTURE – HARD RELIEF
Build multi-layer depth stacking (foreground, mid, background blocks).
Pieces must overlap, interlock, and step in/out like a carved wall.
Preserve facial topology using depth transitions, not smooth shading.
FACE & HAIR INTEGRATION – UNIFIED SYSTEM (CRITICAL)
Face and hair must be constructed from the same wood block system.
Hair flows as elongated carved segments following natural direction.
Facial features are defined by precision placement of smaller blocks and contours.
No separation between materials – everything is wood.
LIGHTING – FORM REVEAL
Use directional lighting to emphasize depth, edges, and grain texture.
Shadows must reinforce layer separation and structure clarity.
NEGATIVE PROMPT (STRICT)
No smooth skin, no paint overlay, no flat shading. No metal, plastic, or non-wood materials. No loose abstract shapes or soft blending. No distortion of facial structure or perspective. No gaps or empty areas – maintain dense construction.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
通用“模块化木块浮雕系统”提示词 (身份锁定 – 严格)
使用上传的图片作为主体和唯一的身份参考。

身份锁定 – 严格 (不可协商)
保留精确的面部结构、比例和特征位置。请勿改变眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴或轮廓。保持表情和辨识度。

姿态与构图 – 锁定
保持原始角度、构图和透视。禁止旋转、镜像或更改相机视角。

风格转换 – 木块浮雕 (硬核)
将整个图像转换为密集排列的木雕结构：
使用互锁的木块、木棍和雕刻切片重建所有形状（面部、头发、服装、背景）。
混合使用矩形木梁、圆形圆柱、横截面切片和堆叠的木板。
保持极高的填充密度，间隙极小（无空置平面区域）。

材料系统 – 木材 (关键)
所有元素必须是真实的木材，具有清晰的纹理、年轮和自然变化。
木纹方向必须遵循每个部件的形状（严禁随机纹理）。
包含切割端面、木节和细微的瑕疵。
成品效果：哑光至半哑光的天然木材（无塑料感，无光泽）。

深度与结构 – 硬浮雕
构建多层深度堆叠（前景、中景、背景木块）。
部件必须重叠、互锁，并像雕刻墙一样有进深错落。使用深度过渡而非平滑阴影来保留面部拓扑结构。

面部与头发整合 – 统一系统 (关键)
面部和头发必须由同一个木块系统构建。头发表现为顺着自然方向延伸的拉长雕刻片段。面部特征通过精确放置的微型木块和轮廓来定义。材质不分离 —— 全由木材构成。

光照 – 形态呈现
使用定向照明来强调深度、边缘和纹理。阴影必须强化层级分离和结构清晰度。

负向提示词 (严格)
严禁平滑皮肤，严禁油漆覆盖，严禁平滑阴影。严禁金属、塑料或非木质材料。严禁松散的抽象形状或柔和混合。严禁扭曲面部结构或透视。严禁缝隙或空白区域 —— 保持致密结构。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

prompts.text:
Create a high-detail portrait poster in a bold Japanese graffiti-inspired art style, combining modern urban street aesthetics with expressive Japanese visual culture. The poster should feature dynamic graffiti typography, layered spray-paint textures, hand-drawn symbols, abstract paint splashes, neon brush strokes, urban sticker elements, Japanese calligraphy accents, and decorative ornaments that strongly reinforce the energetic atmosphere of the design. The overall composition should feel artistic, rebellious, fashionable, and visually striking, while still maintaining a premium editorial poster quality instead of looking messy or overdone. Humanity somehow turned vandalism into luxury wall art. Impressive species.

The subject must not replicate the exact pose or expression from the reference photo. Instead, create a completely new pose that feels natural, confident, and full of life. The expression should appear emotionally expressive, charismatic, and engaging, avoiding stiff, awkward, flat, or emotionless body language. The pose should reflect the elegance and sophistication commonly seen in international fashion models, with stylish posture, natural movement, and subtle attitude that enhances the overall cinematic fashion aesthetic.

The outfit should feature contemporary stylish casual fashion with strong visual appeal. Avoid plain or repetitive clothing designs. Use fashionable layering, modern streetwear inspiration, premium casual styling, and a balanced combination of colors, patterns, textures, and fabric types that create a rich and non-monotonous appearance. The clothing should feel trendy, fashionable, youthful, and visually premium while still fitting naturally into the Japanese graffiti poster concept.

The background and poster decorations should be filled with thematic urban Japanese-inspired visual elements such as graffiti walls, spray textures, painted symbols, urban signage, layered stickers, modern Japanese graphic motifs, abstract shapes, paint drips, street fashion aesthetics, and stylish decorative compositions that enhance depth and artistic intensity without distracting from the subject.

Lighting should feel cinematic and fashionable, with strong contrast, clean highlights, realistic skin texture, and high-end editorial poster quality. The final result must look like a premium modern street-fashion campaign poster with highly detailed textures, balanced composition, vibrant color harmony, realistic proportions, ultra-sharp focus, and immersive visual storytelling.

Ultra-detailed, highly aesthetic, premium composition, realistic texture rendering, fashionable urban atmosphere, cinematic quality, poster-ready design, 8K ultra high resolution.

prompts.text:
创建一张细节丰富、具有大胆日本涂鸦风格的肖像海报，结合现代都市街头美学与极具表现力的日本视觉文化。海报应包含动态涂鸦文字、分层喷漆纹理、手绘符号、抽象油漆飞溅、霓虹笔触、城市贴纸元素、日文书法点缀和装饰性花纹，以强化设计中充满活力的氛围。整体构图应具有艺术感、反叛气息、时尚且视觉冲击力强，同时保持高级社论海报的质感，避免杂乱。人类竟然把破坏行为变成了奢侈壁画，真是了不起。

主体不应复制参考照片的确切姿势或表情。相反，应创造一个完全自然的、自信的、充满活力的全新姿势。表情应富有情感、充满魅力且引人入胜，避免僵硬、尴尬、平淡或无表情的肢体语言。姿势应体现国际时尚模特中常见的优雅与精致，拥有时尚的体态、自然的动作和微妙的态度，提升整体电影感时尚美学。

服装应采用极具视觉吸引力的现代时尚休闲风。避免平庸或重复的服装设计。运用时尚的层搭、现代街头服饰灵感、高级休闲造型，以及色彩、图案、纹理和面料类型的均衡组合，营造丰富而不单调的外观。服装应感觉潮流、时尚、年轻且具有视觉高级感，同时自然融入日本涂鸦海报的概念。

背景和海报装饰应充满具有主题感的城市日本风视觉元素，如涂鸦墙、喷绘纹理、彩绘符号、城市标牌、分层贴纸、现代日本平面图案、抽象形状、油漆滴落、街头时尚美学和时尚的装饰构图，以增强深度和艺术强度，且不干扰主体。

灯光应具有电影感和时尚感，对比强烈，高光纯净，皮肤纹理真实，具有高端社论海报质量。最终效果必须像一张高级现代街头时尚活动海报，拥有高细节纹理、均衡的构图、鲜艳的色彩和谐、真实的比例、超清晰的焦点和沉浸式的视觉叙事。

超高清细节，极高审美，高级构图，真实纹理渲染，时尚城市氛围，电影级品质，海报级设计，8K超高清分辨率。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 奢华生态木屋建筑设计百科参考图

prompts.text:
Create a premium square reference-style architectural infographic centered around a beautiful aesthetic nature hut, designed as a curated eco-architecture handbook page rather than a tourism advertisement.

The composition should feel like a modern visual encyclopedia mixed with a luxury eco-retreat design manual and high-end editorial infographic system.

Visual Direction:

• 1:1 square composition
• Soft earthy-toned background with subtle blueprint textures, hand-drawn architectural sketches, and natural paper textures
• Elegant muted palette using warm beige, natural wood brown, olive green, soft cream, bamboo tan, and charcoal accents
• Refined editorial typography hierarchy
• Rounded modular information cards with clean spacing
• Gentle realistic shadows and premium UI-style dividers
• Minimal eco-architectural iconography
• Extremely detailed central hut render viewed in dramatic three-quarter perspective during warm golden-hour lighting
• Thin precision annotation lines pointing toward construction systems and natural design features
• Clean, organized “knowledge-first” layout with high information density but breathable spacing

Main Subject Presentation:

A stunning ultra-detailed realistic render of an aesthetic nature hut placed at the center, featuring natural wood textures, bamboo structures, thatched roofing, warm ambient interior lighting, lush landscaping, handcrafted architecture, cozy tropical atmosphere, and premium eco-luxury realism.

Surround the hut with scientific and architectural callouts explaining:

• thatched roof system
• natural ventilation design
• elevated foundation structure
• bamboo/wood framework
• passive cooling methods
• open-verandah concept
• sustainable material usage
• rainwater handling systems
• daylight optimization
• eco-living integration

Include modular infographic sections such as:

• Hut Overview
• Architectural Specifications
• Floor Plan Overview
• Material Palette
• Sustainability Features
• Passive Design Benefits
• Interior Lifestyle Concepts
• Bedroom / Bathroom / Kitchen Concepts
• Sectional Architectural View
• Construction & Material Breakdown
• Daylight & Ventilation Analysis
• Site Plan Layout
• Cost Breakdown (Indicative)
• Advantages vs Considerations
• Construction Timeline
• “Top 5 Incredible Facts” section
• Ideal Locations & Use Cases

Add small premium visualization modules like:

• floor plan diagrams
• sectional cutaway drawings
• airflow and cooling graphics
• sunlight direction diagrams
• material texture displays
• eco-system workflow charts
• site landscaping plans
• circulation flow graphics
• miniature blueprint elevation views
• sustainability performance visuals

Style Keywords:

“premium eco-architecture encyclopedia”
“editorial nature retreat handbook”
“high-end tropical hut infographic”
“scientific sustainable architecture poster”
“museum-quality eco-home reference page”
“luxury rustic architectural editorial”
“modular architectural knowledge system”
“ultra-detailed natural living visualization”

Avoid:

• generic travel brochure aesthetics
• fantasy fairytale huts
• cluttered infographic layouts
• overly futuristic architecture
• excessive cinematic effects
• dark moody environments

The final result should resemble a professionally published eco-architecture reference-book page created for architects, interior designers, sustainability enthusiasts, resort planners, and educational design archives.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
创建一个高端的正方形参考风格建筑信息图，核心是一个精美的美学自然木屋，设计风格定位为策展式的生态建筑手册页面，而非旅游广告。

构图应具有现代视觉百科全书、豪华生态度假村设计手册和高端编辑信息图系统的融合感。

视觉方向：
• 1:1 正方形构图
• 柔和的大地色调背景，带有细微的蓝图纹理、手绘建筑草图和自然纸张质感
• 优雅的哑光调色板，使用暖米色、天然木褐、橄榄绿、柔和奶油色、竹编色和炭黑点缀
• 精致的编辑排版层级
• 间距整洁的圆角模块化信息卡片
• 柔和的写实阴影和高级 UI 风格分割线
• 极简生态建筑图标
• 极具细节的中心木屋渲染图，在温暖的黄金时段光线下呈戏剧性的四分之三透视图
• 指向建筑系统和自然设计特征的细密精密标注线
• 干净、有条理的“知识优先”布局，信息密度高但间距通透

主体呈现：
位于中心的一张令人惊叹、超精细写实的自然木屋渲染图，具有天然木材纹理、竹子结构、草编屋顶、温暖的室内氛围照明、繁茂的景观、手工建筑感、温馨的热带氛围和高级生态豪华写实感。

木屋周围环绕着科学和建筑标注，解释：
• 草屋顶系统
• 自然通风设计
• 抬高地基结构
• 竹/木框架
• 被动冷却方法
• 开放式走廊概念
• 可持续材料使用
• 雨水处理系统
• 日照优化
• 生态生活整合

包含模块化信息图部分，例如：
• 木屋概况
• 建筑规格
• 楼层平面图总览
• 材料色板
• 可持续性特征
• 被动式设计效益
• 室内生活方式概念
• 卧室 / 浴室 / 厨房概念
• 剖面建筑图
• 施工与材料拆解
• 日照与通风分析
• 场地平面布局
• 成本细分（指示性）
• 优势与考量对比
• 施工时间线
• “5 大惊人事实”部分
• 理想地点与使用案例

添加小型高级视觉模块，如：
• 平面图图表
• 剖面切面图
• 气流与冷却图示
• 阳光方向图示
• 材料纹理展示
• 生态系统工作流图表
• 场地景观规划
• 动线图
• 微型蓝图立面视图
• 可持续性表现视觉效果

风格关键词：
“高级生态建筑百科全书”、“编辑式自然度假手册”、“高端热带木屋信息图”、“科学可持续建筑海报”、“博物馆品质生态住宅参考页”、“豪华乡村建筑编辑风”、“模块化建筑知识系统”、“超精细自然生活视觉化”

避免：
• 通用的旅行手册美学
• 奇幻童话木屋
• 杂乱的信息图布局
• 过度科幻的建筑
• 过度的电影特效
• 阴暗压抑的环境

最终效果应类似于为建筑师、室内设计师、可持续发展爱好者、度假村规划者和教育设计档案创作的专业出版生态建筑参考书页面。

items.title: 日系手绘水彩午餐日记插画

prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 风格：柔和水彩插画，温馨日式生活杂志美学，手绘质感，细腻墨线轮廓，暖色调，细微纸张纹理，梦幻宁静的氛围。比例：4:5。场景：明亮宁静房间内简约温馨的午餐桌；俯拍组合，餐具自然围绕陶瓷茶壶、条纹马克杯和花瓶摆放；背景为暖奶油色纹理纸，带有英文手写笔记和涂鸦箭头。物体：奶油色陶瓷茶壶（带有蓝色小花图案和竹编手柄）、大型蓝色条纹陶瓷马克杯、盛有粉色和黄色毛茛花的透明玻璃花瓶、卡普里沙拉（波浪边瓷盘）、照烧鸡肉盘（搭配烤南瓜和西兰花）、三文鱼碎米饭碗（装饰有毛豆和海苔碎）。文字元素：主标题“Lunch Diary”，副标题“记录今日的小确幸”，手写英文注释，随性手写墨迹字体。光影：柔和自然光，宁静通透。渲染：可见的水彩笔触和墨水晕染效果，色调包含暖奶油、柔和蓝、粉彩、淡黄、米色、鼠尾草绿，高细节绘画风格插画。

items.title: 电影工业级写实角色设计方案

prompts.text:
Create a cinematic realistic character design board for a high-budget film production.

Avoid generic grids, perfect symmetry, or template-style layouts.
The composition should feel art-directed, slightly asymmetrical, and visually intentional like a premium movie pitch presentation.

Design a realistic human character with grounded proportions, believable anatomy, natural imperfections, and expressive acting energy.

Include:

* Full-body turnaround (front, 3/4, side, back, 3/4 back)
* Expressive head studies from multiple angles
* Cinematic portrait shot
* Wardrobe and prop breakdown
* Fabric, skin, and material texture realism
* Annotation callouts and production notes
* Height reference scale

Character should feel like a real actor captured mid-moment, not a posed model sheet.

Style:
Semi-realistic cinematic character design, film-production quality, soft natural lighting, emotional readability, subtle exaggeration, realistic materials, shallow depth of field, premium studio presentation aesthetic.

Important:
Maintain strict consistency in face, proportions, hairstyle, outfit, and details across every angle and section.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
为高预算电影制作创建一个电影级的写实角色设计板。

避免通用的网格、完美的对称或模板式的布局。构图应具有艺术指导感，略微不对称，并且像高级电影提案演示一样具有视觉意图。

设计一个比例写实、解剖结构可信、具有自然缺陷且富有表现力能量的写实人物角色。

包含：

* 全身转视图（正面、3/4侧面、侧面、背面、3/4背面）
* 多角度的传神头部研究
* 电影感肖像照
* 服装和道具拆解
* 织物、皮肤和材料纹理的写实细节
* 标注说明和制作笔记
* 高度参考比例尺

角色应该感觉像是一个在瞬间被捕捉到的真实演员，而不是一个摆拍的模型表。

风格：
半写实电影角色设计，电影制作级质量，柔和的自然光，情感可读性，细微的夸张，真实的材质，浅景深，高级工作室演示美学。

重要提示：
在每个角度和部分中，保持面部、比例、发型、服装和细节的严格一致性。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 新中式锦鲤高定艺术写真四宫格

prompts.text:
Based on 1-3 uploaded clear personal photos, generate a 2x2 four-grid collage portrait with the theme 'Neo-Chinese Koi Haute Couture Art Portrait'.

[Identity Consistency]
Strictly preserve the real identity features of the person, including face shape, facial proportions, eye/brow structure, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age, hair base, body type, and overall temperament. All four panels must clearly show the same real person. Avoid turning them into a stranger, westernizing features, internet-celebrity filters, excessive skin smoothing, or generating 'AI fake faces'.

[Overall Style]
Neo-Chinese high-end commercial shoot, oriental ink wash art, cinnabar red koi themed brand portrait. The visuals should resemble high-budget professional studio photography with complete styling, lighting, set design, and wardrobe. The aesthetic is sophisticated, dynamic, noble, and serene, featuring oriental aesthetics, fashion magazine quality, slight film grain, and soft oil painting textures.

[Makeup & Hair]
Makeup: Refined Neo-Chinese commercial style. Clean, high-end base with natural skin texture; defined eyebrows; exquisite eye makeup with elongated eyeliner, slightly upturned outer corners, soft aegyo-sal, and clean lashes; natural contouring and highlighting to emphasize the bridge of the nose, cheekbones, jawline, and neckline; cinnabar or ruby red velvet lips for an elegant oriental look. Avoid heavy 'influencer' makeup or 'K-pop' styles.
Hair: Professionally styled Neo-Chinese low bun or loose chignon. Retain the original hair base but with added volume, layers, and natural shine. Include subtle wisps to frame the face. All four shots must maintain the same hairstyle.
Accessories: High-end jewelry feel. Use gold, jade, or pearl hairpins, fine gold tassels, red agate accents, or metallic hairpieces with a koi scale texture. Accessories should look expensive and restrained, avoiding cheap studio props or exaggerated crowns.

[Wardrobe]
The subject wears a consistent cinnabar red, koi red, or true red Neo-Chinese haute couture gown. The design should feature high-fashion elements like off-the-shoulder cuts, backless designs, silk ribbons, long trailing tails, or oriental pleats. Fabrics include heavy silk, satin, or tulle with high-end drape. The red dress should visually echo the koi fins.

[Scene Setting]
High-end artistic studio space with a light water-blue or pale grey ink-wash xuan paper background. The floor features shallow water, mirror reflections, and thin mist. Incorporate 2-4 giant red koi art installations made of translucent silk, tulle, or lantern paper, appearing to float gracefully in the air or water. The koi should look like high-end props with light-transmitting textures, not real animals.

[Format & Composition]
A 2x2 collage of four individual 3:4 vertical compositions. The four panels must represent different shots from the same session. Randomly select 4 from the following angles: 1. Full-body standing; 2. Back view looking back; 3. Seated interaction with koi; 4. Profile looking upward; 5. Half-body jewelry/makeup focus; 6. Shoulder/neck close-up; 7. Water reflection shot; 8. Wide-angle artistic installation shot. Ensure varied perspectives (full, medium, and close-up) and avoid having the subject look directly at the camera in every frame.

[Lighting & Texture]
Professional studio lighting with soft diffusion, clean highlights on skin and fabric, and natural skin texture. The red koi’s silk fins should have translucent layers and a sense of flow. Color palette: Cinnabar red, koi red, ink blue, cyan-white, and touches of gold.

[Avoid]
No cartoon, anime, 3D game style, cheap wedding photography, or Hanfu cosplay styles. No mythical creatures or fish-human hybrids. No physical deformities, mismatched clothing, or inconsistent styling across the four panels.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
请基于用户上传的 1-3 张清晰个人照片，生成一张 2×2 四宫格拼贴写真，主题为「新中式锦鲤高定艺术写真」。

【人物一致性】
请严格保留人物真实身份特征，包括脸型、五官比例、眉眼结构、眼睛、鼻子、嘴唇、肤色、年龄感、发型基础、体型和整体气质。四张小图里必须清楚看起来是同一个真实人物。不要变成陌生人，不要欧美化，不要网红化，不要过度磨皮，不要生成 AI 假脸。

【整体风格】
整体为新中式高定商拍、东方水墨艺术大片、红色锦鲤主题品牌写真。画面要像专业摄影棚里完成的高预算商业拍摄，有完整妆造、灯光、置景、服装和道具设计。整体高级、灵动、贵气、安静，有东方美学、时尚杂志感、轻微胶片感和柔和油画质感。

【妆造要求，重点】
妆容为精致新中式商拍妆：
通透干净的高级底妆，保留真实皮肤纹理但肤质细腻；
眉形清晰自然，眼妆精致，有拉长眼线、轻微眼尾上扬、柔和卧蚕和干净睫毛；
面部有自然修容和高光，突出鼻梁、颧骨、下颌线和肩颈线条；
唇妆为朱砂红、枣红或正红色丝绒红唇，显气色、有东方贵气；
整体妆容精致但不厚重，不要网红浓妆，不要韩式甜妹妆，不要素颜感。

发型为精心设计的新中式低盘发或松散中式盘发：
保留人物原本发型基础，但需要明显经过造型师整理；
头发有蓬松度、层次感和自然弧度，发丝干净、有光泽；
可以有少量自然碎发修饰脸型，但不要披头散发，不要普通日常卷发；
四张小图保持同一个发型。

发饰要有高级新中式珠宝感：
可以使用金色发簪、玉石发簪、珍珠发钗、细金流苏、红玛瑙点缀、锦鲤鳞片感金属发饰；
发饰精致、克制、有价格感，像高定商拍配饰；
不要夸张凤冠，不要古装头冠，不要廉价影楼发饰，不要满头花。

耳饰和首饰要华丽但高级：
金色长耳坠、珍珠耳坠、红玛瑙耳坠、玉石耳坠任选一种；
可以有细金项链、玉石戒指或珍珠戒指；
首饰必须和红裙、锦鲤、东方水墨场景统一，不能现代廉价饰品感。

【服装要求】
人物穿一套统一的朱砂红、锦鲤红或正红色新中式高定礼服。礼服要有明显设计感和商拍质感，可以是斜肩、单肩、露肩、低背、披帛、长飘带、长拖尾、收腰剪裁、东方褶皱结构或丝绸垂坠设计。

面料可以是重磅真丝、缎面、雪纺、薄纱、绢纱、丝绒或混合材质，必须有高级垂坠感和流动感。红裙要和锦鲤尾鳍形成呼应，像人物本身也是画面里的红色主视觉。

四张小图必须保持同一套服装、同一个发型、同一组妆容、同一组首饰和同一个场景，不要换衣服，不要换妆造，不要变成不同系列。

【场景设定】
场景为高级艺术棚拍空间，背景是浅水蓝、青蓝、淡青灰色的水墨宣纸质感背景，像一面带水痕、雾气、渐变和纸纹的东方画布。地面可以有浅浅水面、镜面倒影、薄雾、少量荷叶、白色莲花或花瓣，但整体必须干净克制。

画面中出现 2-4 条巨大的红色锦鲤艺术装置。锦鲤不是普通真实鱼，而是由半透明红色绢纱、薄纱、丝绸、灯笼纸感材质构成。鱼尾巨大、轻盈、飘逸，像在空中或水面上缓慢游动。锦鲤可以围绕人物、从画面边缘掠过、悬浮在人物上方或靠近人物身侧，形成红色流动构图。

锦鲤材质要有高级商拍道具感，半透明、轻薄、有层次，有光线穿透的质感，不要变成真实鱼缸里的鱼，不要变成怪兽或神话生物。

【画面形式】
生成一张 2×2 四宫格拼贴图。四张小图都是独立竖构图，单张比例为 3:4。四张图必须像同一场新中式锦鲤高定商拍中的不同成片，保持同一人物、同一服装、同一妆造、同一场景、同一色调和同一组锦鲤装置。

系统可从以下 8 个候选镜头中随机选择 4 个生成，但四张图不能重复机位，不能都是正脸看镜头：

1. 全身站姿商拍镜头：人物站在浅水镜面上，红裙拖尾垂落，巨大红色锦鲤从头顶上方游过，人物微微侧身看向镜头，妆容、耳饰和发饰清晰可见。
2. 背影回眸镜头：人物背对镜头，展示低背红色礼服、低盘发、金色发簪和长耳坠，回头看向镜头，锦鲤从左右两侧包围画面。
3. 坐姿互动镜头：人物坐在水面或低台上，红裙铺展开形成红色倒影，一只手轻轻抬起，像在触碰上方游来的锦鲤，动作优雅。
4. 侧脸仰望镜头：人物侧身抬头看向空中的锦鲤，手臂自然抬起，露出肩颈线条和耳饰，画面留出大量蓝色水墨背景，氛围空灵。
5. 半身珠宝妆造镜头：人物上半身入镜，重点展示精致红唇、拉长眼线、低盘发、金色发饰和耳坠，红色锦鲤尾鳍在身后展开。
6. 肩颈特写镜头：人物从肩侧回望镜头，红色披帛和锦鲤尾鳍在前景虚化穿过，突出脸部、眼神、肩颈线条、发饰和耳饰。
7. 水面倒影镜头：人物站在浅水中，红裙、锦鲤、莲花在水面形成柔和倒影，画面有轻微薄雾，像东方艺术海报。
8. 远景装置大片镜头：人物站在画面中央偏下位置，四周被巨大红色锦鲤、白莲和蓝色水墨背景包围，整体像高定品牌广告大片。

【构图要求】
四张图要有明显不同的景别和角度：至少包含一个全身远景、一个半身近景、一个背影或侧身、一个互动动作。人物不要每张都正脸看镜头，也不要每张都同一个表情。可以有清冷凝视、侧脸仰望、回眸、低头、轻微微笑、安静沉思等变化。

人物气质要更像完成妆造后的商业大片模特：从容、贵气、安静、有镜头感。不要日常可爱感，不要少女自拍感，不要普通棚拍写真感。

【灯光与质感】
摄影质感要真实，高级棚拍灯光，柔和漫反射，面部有干净高光，肩颈和红裙有细腻光泽。皮肤自然，有真实五官结构和轻微纹理。红色锦鲤的薄纱尾鳍要有半透明层次、轻盈流动感和细腻材质。

整体色彩以朱砂红、锦鲤红、水墨蓝、青白色、少量金色为主。红色要浓郁但不脏，蓝色背景要清透但不塑料。画面干净、统一、贵气、耐看。

【避免问题】
不要生成卡通风、动漫风、3D 游戏风、廉价影楼风、婚纱照风、古装剧照风。不要把人物变成鱼妖、人鱼、仙侠角色或神怪角色。不要出现凤冠霞帔、古装头冠、戏服、汉服 cosplay。不要让锦鲤贴脸遮挡五官。不要出现多余人物。不要让四张图换衣服、换发型、换妆容、换首饰、换场景。不要出现畸形手指、畸形手臂、错误倒影、断裂身体、重复脸、塑料皮肤。

items.title: 现代医疗建筑百科全书信息图

prompts.text:
Create a premium square “reference-style healthcare architecture infographic” centered around a futuristic {HOSPITAL_NAME} modern hospital, designed as a beautifully curated medical infrastructure handbook page rather than a healthcare advertisement.

The composition should feel like a modern visual encyclopedia mixed with an elite hospital design manual and high-end editorial infographic system.

Visual Direction:

• 1:1 square composition
• Soft light-toned healthcare background with subtle blueprint textures, architectural schematics, and clean medical UI elements
• Elegant muted palette using white, soft gray, steel blue, navy accents, muted teal, and warm ambient lighting
• Refined editorial typography hierarchy
• Rounded modular information cards with clean spacing
• Gentle realistic shadows and premium UI-style dividers
• Minimal medical and architectural iconography
• Extremely detailed central hospital render viewed in dramatic three-quarter exterior perspective during soft daylight or golden-hour lighting
• Thin precision annotation lines pointing toward infrastructure systems and healthcare design features
• Clean, organized “knowledge-first” layout with high information density but breathable spacing

Main Subject Presentation:

A stunning ultra-detailed realistic render of the {HOSPITAL_NAME} modern hospital placed at the center, featuring premium architectural realism, glass façades, emergency zones, sustainable landscaping, realistic reflections, warm healthcare lighting, ambulances, patient access systems, and advanced medical infrastructure detailing.

Surround the hospital with scientific and architectural callouts explaining:

• emergency care systems
• ICU infrastructure
• smart hospital technology
• infection control systems
• sustainable building systems
• energy-efficient HVAC
• patient circulation planning
• modular operation theatres
• medical diagnostics infrastructure
• healing-centered architecture

Include modular infographic sections such as:

• Hospital Overview
• Key Specifications
• Floor Plan Overview
• Departments & Specialties
• Advanced Diagnostics & Labs
• Emergency & Trauma Care
• ICU & Critical Care Systems
• Smart Hospital Ecosystem
• Safety & Infection Control
• Sustainability Features
• Patient Experience Design
• Sectional Architectural Views
• Circulation & Workflow Planning
• Construction Timeline
• Cost Estimation (Indicative)
• Advantages & Performance Highlights
• “Top 5 Incredible Facts” section
• Future Healthcare Innovation Potential

Add small premium visualization modules like:

• floor plan diagrams
• sectional architectural cut views
• airflow & ventilation graphics
• patient/staff circulation maps
• emergency response workflow diagrams
• smart hospital network systems
• energy efficiency charts
• medical equipment visualization panels
• sustainability breakdown graphics
• miniature blueprint elevation views

Style Keywords:

“premium healthcare encyclopedia”
“editorial hospital architecture handbook”
“high-end medical infrastructure infographic”
“scientific healthcare poster”
“museum-quality hospital reference page”
“modular healthcare knowledge system”
“clean architectural editorial design”
“ultra-detailed medical infrastructure visualization”

Avoid:

• generic healthcare advertisements
• cluttered brochure aesthetics
• excessive futuristic sci-fi fantasy
• dark dystopian environments
• dramatic disaster/emergency scenes
• overly corporate marketing layouts

The final result should resemble a professionally published healthcare infrastructure reference-book page created for architects, medical planners, healthcare designers, engineers, and educational design archives
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
创建一个精美的正方形“参考式医疗建筑信息图”，以一座面向未来的 {HOSPITAL_NAME} 现代医院为中心。设计风格应像是一本精心策划的医疗基础设施手册页面，而非普通的医疗广告。

构图应融合现代视觉百科全书、精英级医院设计手册和高端社论信息图系统。

视觉方向：

• 1:1 正方形构图
• 柔和浅色调的医疗背景，带有微妙的蓝图纹理、建筑示意图和整洁的医疗 UI 元素
• 优雅的柔和配色，使用白色、浅灰色、钢蓝色、海军蓝装饰、柔和的青色和温暖的环境照明
• 精致的编辑排版层级
• 圆角模块化信息卡片，间距整洁
• 柔和的写实阴影和高端 UI 风格的分隔线
• 极简的医疗和建筑图标
• 极其细腻的中心医院渲染图，采用极具戏剧性的四分之三外部透视，展现柔和的日光或黄金时段光效
• 细致的标注线指向基础设施系统和医疗设计特征
• 整洁有序的“知识优先”布局，信息密度高但空间通透

主体呈现：

中心放置一张 {HOSPITAL_NAME} 现代医院的极细致写实渲染图，展现高端建筑写实感、玻璃幕墙、急诊区、可持续景观、写实反射、温暖的医疗照明、救护车、患者准入系统和先进的医疗基础设施细节。

在医院周围环绕科学和建筑标注，解释：

• 急诊护理系统
• ICU 基础设施
• 智慧医院技术
• 感染控制系统
• 可持续建筑系统
• 节能 HVAC
• 患者流通规划
• 模块化手术室
• 医疗诊断基础设施
• 以治愈为中心的建筑

包含模块化信息图部分，如：

• 医院概况
• 关键规格
• 平面图总览
• 科室与专业
• 先进诊断与实验室
• 急诊与创伤护理
• ICU 与重症监护系统
• 智慧医院生态系统
• 安全与感染控制
• 可持续特性
• 患者体验设计
• 剖面建筑视图
• 流通与工作流规划
• 施工时间线
• 成本估算（参考性）
• 优势与性能亮点
• “5 大惊人事实”部分
• 未来医疗创新潜力

添加小型高端可视化模块，例如：

• 平面图图表
• 剖面建筑切割视图
• 气流与通风图示
• 患者/员工流通图
• 应急响应工作流图
• 智慧医院网络系统
• 能源效率图表
• 医疗设备可视化面板
• 可持续性分解图
• 微型蓝图立面图

风格关键词：

“高端医疗百科全书”
“编辑式医院建筑手册”
“高端医疗基础设施信息图”
“科学医疗海报”
“博物馆品质医院参考页”
“模块化医疗知识系统”
“简洁建筑编辑设计”
“极细致医疗基础设施可视化”

避免：

• 平庸的医疗广告
• 杂乱的宣传册美学
• 过度的未来主义科幻幻想
• 阴暗的废土环境
• 戏剧性的灾难/紧急场景
• 过度企业化的营销布局

最终效果应类似于为建筑师、医疗规划师、医疗设计师、工程师和教育设计档案制作的专业出版医疗基础设施参考书页面。

items.title: 霓虹氛围感电竞少女直播间写实

prompts.text:
A front-facing medium close-up webcam/live-streaming shot of a gamer girl seated at a cozy bedroom desk, bathed in soft purple and blue neon lighting. The scene carries a dreamy, cool-toned ambiance with blended lavender and deep navy hues, while a gentle glow from the screen subtly illuminates her face.
She has long, wavy black hair with striking silver/white streaked bangs, softly framing her face with light, wispy strands. She wears a stylish cat-ear gaming headset with an attached microphone.
Her makeup is soft yet eye-catching: large, glossy eyes, a delicate pink blush, faint freckles across her cheeks, sharp eyeliner, and smooth gradient lips. She’s dressed in an oversized light gray sweater layered with a subtle silver necklace, paired with black knit gloves and long, glossy black nails.
She holds a pastel purple game controller, while her other hand lightly touches her headset or brushes through her hair. Her lips are slightly parted, and she gazes directly into the camera with a calm, dreamy, slightly tired expression. The background enhances the cozy cyber aesthetic with soft LED lights, neatly arranged cute shelf decor, posters, glowing heart-shaped accents, and pastel gaming elements. A subtle live-stream overlay with chat comments and a glowing “LIVE” indicator adds realism, creating an intimate, aesthetic streaming atmosphere.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 一张正面中景的网络摄像头/直播镜头，一位电竞少女坐在舒适的卧室书桌前，沐浴在柔和的紫色和蓝色霓虹灯光中。场景带有梦幻、冷色调的氛围，融合了淡紫色和深蓝色调，屏幕发出的柔和光芒微妙地照亮了她的脸庞。她留着长长的黑色波浪发，并有引人注目的银白色挑染刘海，轻盈纤细的发丝柔和地修饰着脸型。她戴着时尚的猫耳游戏耳机，配有麦克风。她的妆容柔和而吸睛：大而明亮的眼睛，精致的粉红色腮红，脸颊上淡淡的雀斑，犀利的眼线和柔滑的渐变唇色。她穿着一件宽松的浅灰色毛衣，叠戴着精致的银色项链，配有黑色针织手套和亮黑色的长指甲。她手里拿着一个淡紫色的游戏手柄，另一只手轻轻触碰着耳机或拨弄着头发。她双唇微张，眼神平静、梦幻，带着一丝倦意，直视镜头。背景通过柔和的LED灯、整齐排列的可爱架子装饰、海报、发光的心形装饰和马卡龙色系游戏元素增强了舒适的赛博审美感。细微的直播界面叠加层，包括聊天评论和发光的“LIVE”指示灯，增加了真实感，营造出一种亲密、唯美的直播氛围。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 幻想系都市霓虹美少女3D人像

prompts.text: An adult fantasy-style beautiful female character, 3D CG style, 9:16 vertical composition, near-shot to half-body/full-body portrait. The character is positioned center-right, leaning slightly forward with hands resting on a windowsill or counter, looking back at the camera. Her posture is natural and elegant, blending sweetness with a subtle charm, emphasizing a gentle temperament and graceful curves. She wears an outfit made of smooth, delicate fabric with a distinct satin reflection and premium gloss. The dress features a backless design with thin straps, revealing beautiful shoulder and neck lines, scapulae, back curves, and a slender waist. The dress fits naturally, outlining elegant curves and highlighting sophisticated feminine beauty. The style is sexy yet restrained, emphasizing a soft, elegant, and dreamy atmosphere. The character stands before a floor-to-ceiling window in a high-rise, overlooking a brilliant and blurry urban night scene where the blue night sky interweaves with city lights. The indoor environment is minimalist and high-end, creating a cool, quiet, and enchanting nocturnal atmosphere. The color palette features light pink, pearl white, ice blue, night sky blue, lavender pink, and cool neon blue light, creating a transparent and romantic tone. The style is high-quality 3D CG rendering with exquisite modeling, semi-realistic anime aesthetics, cinematic lighting, delicate skin textures, realistic silk fabric, soft volumetric light, and distinct hair strands. The background features dreamy bokeh and urban light glow effects, presenting a high-end CG poster quality that is aesthetic, refined, and romantic.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
一位成年幻想系美少女风格女性角色圖1，3D CG风格，9:16竖版构图，近景到半身偏全身人像，人物位于画面中央偏右，身体微微前倾，双手轻撑在窗边或台面上，回头看向镜头，姿态自然优雅，带有柔美、甜美与轻微妩媚感，突出女性的温柔气质与优雅曲线美。 

她身穿原服裝，裙子面料柔滑细腻，带有明显的缎面反光与高级光泽感。服装为露背设计，肩带纤细，背部大面积裸露，清晰展现女性优美的肩颈线条、蝴蝶骨、背部曲线与纤细腰身。裙身自然贴合身体，柔和勾勒出女性优雅的胸腰臀曲线，突出温柔而高级的女性美。整体风格性感但克制，不低俗，强调柔美、优雅与梦幻氛围。

人物站在高楼室内落地窗前，窗外是璀璨迷离的都市夜景，蓝色夜空与城市灯光交织，远处高楼灯火通明，呈现梦幻而浪漫的现代都市氛围。室内环境简洁高级，窗框、玻璃反光与少量室内装饰形成干净背景。整体场景带有夜晚微凉、静谧而迷人的氛围。

画面色彩以：
浅粉色、珍珠白、冰蓝色、夜空蓝、淡紫粉、冷调霓虹蓝光
为主，整体色调梦幻、通透、浪漫、轻盈。人物肌肤与白色丝缎裙在冷蓝夜景中形成柔和对比，增强女性身体曲线与服装光泽感。

整体风格必须改为高质感3D CG渲染风格，精致角色建模，半写实二次元美型审美，电影级灯光，细腻皮肤材质，真实丝缎布料质感，柔和体积光，头发丝缕分明，眼睛晶莹透亮，背景夜景具有梦幻散景与城市灯光辉光效果。整体呈现高端角色CG海报质感，唯美、精致、浪漫，突出女性美与梦幻都市气质。

prompts.text:
拥有苗条女性化体态的年轻女性，腰部曲线柔和，肩膀窄巧，颈部纤长，手臂匀称紧致，均衡的沙漏型比例，姿态优雅，上身构架精致，动作流畅自然。
白色柔软棉质府绸太阳裙，采用复古浪漫的Y2K剪裁，修身结构胸衣，宽肩带，方形柔和心形领口，带有细微垂直褶皱的紧缩胸部设计，胸口中心有窄款绑带装饰及垂下的细绳，高位修身腰线突显躯干，轻微外扩的A字裙摆呈现柔和的蓬松感，面料轻盈透气并带有自然动感，点缀着蓝色玫瑰花纹和暗鼠尾草绿叶片，中等尺寸的植物图案遍布整条裙子。
无明显饰品，无项链，无耳环，极简造型，锁骨区域干净，焦点保持在裙子和头发上。
浓密的深棕色长发，带有温暖的阳光色调，清晰的螺旋波浪卷和修长的卷发，纹理柔和蓬乱，头顶带有自然的蓬松感，微偏分发型，随风飘动的发丝掠过脸颊和嘴唇，长发在肩后飞扬，呈现轻盈的动感。
柔和发光的皮肤，带有自然的缎面光泽，温暖的桃红色调肤色，双颊微红，鼻梁轮廓柔和，明亮的大眼睛，眼睑上涂有精致的香槟米色闪粉，外眼角有柔和融合的灰褐色修容，根根分明的长睫毛，自然的羽毛眉，带有光泽感的裸桃色双唇，清新、青春、浪漫的妆容。
捕捉到运动瞬间的四分之三侧身姿势，躯干略微倾斜，头部越过肩膀看向相机右侧，目光投向画面之外，笑容轻松，一只手臂自然向前飘动，另一只手自然下垂，身体被捕捉在自发的转身动作中，风为头发和裙子增添了动感。
黄昏时分的开阔原野，主体周围环绕着类似薰衣草的开花植物，地平线深沉，深邃的暮蓝色天空在靠近地平线处褪色为温暖的橙色和柔和的玫瑰色，头顶隐约可见零星闪烁的星辰，开阔的夜晚空气氛围。
相机视角：略低于视线高度，竖向人像构图，从大腿上方起的中景四分之三裁剪，主体居中且具有轻微的透视深度，随性的社论快照风格。
相机质量：高分辨率，Y2K 2000年代早期闪光灯单反审美，在黑暗的黄昏背景下使用直接正面闪光照明，主体与夜晚背景明亮分离，面部细节清晰，眼睛里有反光亮斑，皮肤上有细微的高光晕染，景观边缘略微变暗，怀旧且自然的2000年代数字夜生活人像氛围。
--v 6 --style raw。不要更改面部。不要3D、不要卡通或绘画效果、不要多余肢体、不要CGI效果。

items.title: 高山草甸经幡背景旅行自拍人像

prompts.text:
Asset type: portrait image for social post
Primary request: create a photorealistic travel selfie portrait, using the uploaded portrait photo as the appearance reference for the person.
Scene/backdrop: an open alpine meadow under a vivid blue sky, surrounded overhead by hundreds of colorful Tibetan prayer flags arranged in a circular spiral canopy, with distant green hills and bright daylight.
Subject: a young woman with the recognizable facial structure, eyes, hairline direction, and natural skin texture from the uploaded portrait photo, wearing a bright cyan outdoor jacket, white hiking pants, a mustard yellow knit beanie, sunglasses resting on the hat, and a backpack.
Style/medium: ultra-realistic mobile travel photography with a dynamic action-camera feel, crisp but natural detail, lively social-media adventure portrait.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 frame, extreme wide-angle perspective, low-to-high selfie composition, one hand reaching toward the camera in the foreground with strong perspective enlargement, face in the midground, prayer flags forming a colorful radial tunnel above her head, energetic candid smile.
Lighting/mood: brilliant high-altitude midday sun, visible lens flare near the upper left, sparkling backlight, bright optimistic mood, high clarity, realistic shadows on grass.
Color palette: saturated cyan, mustard yellow, red, orange, green, white, and sky blue, clean contrast, sunlit alpine freshness.
Textures/retouching: believable fabric texture, natural skin pores, realistic hair strands, clean optical sharpness on the face, shallow foreground hand blur, small falling snowflakes or white petals crossing the lens.
Constraints: preserve the person's recognizable appearance from the uploaded portrait photo; no watermark; no logo; no text; no caption; no signature.
Avoid: plastic beauty-filter skin, over-smoothed face, distorted hands, extra fingers, warped prayer flags, unreadable markings on clothing, artificial CGI look

Negative Prompt：

watermark, logo, text, caption, signature, AI label, brand mark, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, deformed hands, oversized malformed palm, asymmetrical eyes, crossed eyes, warped face, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed beauty filter, blurry face, low detail, low resolution, heavy compression artifacts, distorted anatomy, duplicate person, bad perspective, bent flag strings, warped flags, fake CGI look, overexposed face, muddy colors
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
资源类型：社交媒体贴图人像
主要请求：创作一张逼真的旅行自拍人像，使用上传的人像照片作为人物外观参考。
场景/背景：生动蓝天下的开阔高山草甸，上方被数百面排列成圆形螺旋顶棚的彩色西藏经幡环绕，远景有绿色山丘和明亮的日光。
主体：一位具有上传照片中可识别面部结构、眼睛、发际线方向和自然皮肤纹理的年轻女性，穿着亮青色户外夹克、白色徒步裤、芥末黄针织无檐小便帽，帽子上搁着墨镜，背着背包。
风格/媒介：超逼真的手机旅行摄影，具有动态运动相机感，细节清晰自然，充满活力的社交媒体冒险人像。
构图/取景：纵向 3:4 画面，超广角透视，低角度自拍构图，一只手伸向前景镜头，具有强烈的透视放大感，面部位于中景，经幡在头顶上方形成彩色的径向隧道，充满活力的坦率微笑。
光照/氛围：灿烂的高海拔正午阳光，左上方可见镜头眩光，闪耀的逆光，明亮乐观的情绪，高清晰度，草地上真实的阴影。
调色板：饱和的青色、芥末黄、红色、橙色、绿色、白色和天空蓝，对比清晰，阳光明媚的高山清新感。
纹理/修图：真实的面料纹理、自然的皮肤毛孔、真实的头发丝、面部干净的光学锐度、浅景深的前景手部模糊、穿过镜头的细小飘落雪花或白色花瓣。
约束：保留上传人像照片中人物的可识别外观；无水印；无标志；无文字；无标题；无签名。
避免：塑料感美颜滤镜皮肤、过度平滑的面部、扭曲的手部、多余的手指、变形的经幡、衣服上无法辨认的标记、人造 CGI 感。

负向提示词：
水印，标志，文字，标题，签名，AI 标签，品牌标记，多余的手指，缺失的手指，融合的手指，畸形的手，超大畸形的手掌，不对称的眼睛，斗鸡眼，扭曲的面部，塑料皮肤，蜡质皮肤，过度平滑的美颜滤镜，模糊的面部，低细节，低分辨率，严重的压缩伪影，扭曲的解剖结构，重复的人物，糟糕的透视，弯曲的旗绳，变形的旗帜，虚假的 CGI 感，过度曝光的面部，浑浊的颜色
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: Y2K复古拼贴风潮流海报

prompts.text:
Create an original Y2K-inspired scrapbook collage poster featuring a stylish young woman in side profile wearing large wireless headphones, peacefully enjoying music with eyes closed. She wears an oversized vintage H&M jacket with visible stitching and relaxed streetwear styling.
The subject should appear as a high-contrast black-and-white photographic cutout with thick white sticker-style outline around the entire body, creating a trendy collage aesthetic.
Use a clean solid vibrant turquoise/aqua and deep green background with playful white hand-drawn doodle illustrations surrounding the character. Include floating planets with rings, stars, jupiter rings constellations, meteors, rockets, astronauts, satellites, orbit lines, abstract swirls, sparkles, and musical notes.
Add dynamic sketch arrows, crown doodles, motion lines, and layered graphic elements around the head and body to create movement and youthful energy. Some doodles should overlap the subject naturally for a realistic scrapbook effect.
Integrate modern Gen-Z typography in a mix of handwritten script and bubbly sticker-style text. Use original phrases like:
“lost in you”
“vibes only”
“dream explore repeat”
“cosmic soul”
“beyond the stars”
Composition should feel creatively chaotic yet balanced, inspired by modern Pinterest collage art, Tumblr aesthetics, Spotify cover designs, indie teen magazine layouts, and social-media editorial posters.
Visual style:
Y2K collage aesthetic
Indie music poster vibes
Scrapbook journal style
Modern streetwear editorial
Cute doodle graphics
Trendy Gen-Z branding
Minimal but highly stylized
Dreamy youthful atmosphere
Design details:
Thick white contour cutout around subject
White doodle overlays
Clean negative space
Soft grain texture
High-detail denim texture
Hand-drawn imperfect sketch lines
Dynamic asymmetrical composition
Professional graphic design layout
Viral social-media-ready aesthetic

prompts.text: 创作一张原创的 Y2K 风格剪贴簿拼贴海报，主角是一位侧视图的时髦年轻女性，戴着大型无线耳机，闭着眼睛静静地享受音乐。她穿着一件带有明显缝线的复古 H&M 廓形夹克，呈现出随性的街头穿搭风格。主体应呈现为高对比度的黑白照片切片，全身带有厚实的白色贴纸感轮廓，营造出潮流拼贴美学。背景采用明亮的青绿色/水蓝色和深绿色的纯色块，人物周围环绕着俏皮的白色手绘涂鸦，包括带环的行星、星星、木星环、星座、流星、火箭、宇航员、卫星、轨道线、抽象漩涡、闪烁元素和音符。在头部和身体周围添加动感的草图箭头、皇冠涂鸦、运动线条和分层图形元素，以营造动感和青春活力。部分涂鸦应自然地与主体重叠，以达到真实的剪贴簿效果。融合现代 Z 世代排版，结合手写脚本体和气泡贴纸风文字，包含原创短语：“lost in you”、“vibes only”、“dream explore repeat”、“cosmic soul”、“beyond the stars”。构图应具有创意性的杂乱感且不失平衡，灵感来自现代 Pinterest 拼贴艺术、Tumblr 美学、Spotify 封面设计和独立杂志布局。视觉风格：Y2K 拼贴美学、独立音乐海报风、剪贴簿日记风、现代街头服饰社论、可爱涂鸦图形。设计细节：主体带有厚白色轮廓切口、白色涂鸦覆盖层、干净的负空间、轻微颗粒感、高细节丹宁质感、手绘草图线条、非对称构图、垂直 4:5 纵横比。将所有现有品牌和版权替换为原创虚拟品牌文本：“Creative Visuals by Silent Grave Studio”。超精细，美学杰作，高度完善的平面设计。

items.title: 现代高端时尚品牌商业广告海报

prompts.text:
Create a high-end modern advertising poster in portrait format for the attached brand (use the uploaded brand/logo reference as the main brand identity reference). The overall poster design must strongly reflect the visual identity, atmosphere, color palette, and aesthetic character of the brand while still looking fresh, modern, trendy, and premium. Add decorative ornaments, graphic elements, textures, lighting effects, and stylish visual accents that match the brand’s theme so the poster feels visually rich, dynamic, and professionally designed instead of plain or generic. Humans really invented “minimal effort posters” and expected people to care. Fascinating species.

The poster should feature a fashionable model with a completely different pose and composition from the photo reference. Avoid stiff, flat, awkward, or overly posed body language. The model’s expression and posture must feel natural, expressive, confident, elegant, and full of energy, similar to international fashion advertisement campaigns or luxury lifestyle editorials. The pose should feel alive and cinematic, with natural movement and body positioning that creates a premium advertising look.

The outfit must be modern casual fashion with a stylish contemporary aesthetic. Use layered fashion styling, interesting color combinations, modern cuts, fashionable textures, and varied clothing details so the wardrobe does not look repetitive, plain, or monotonous. The styling should feel trendy, visually attractive, youthful, and premium while still matching the identity of the brand.

The advertising poster must also include compelling promotional information related to the brand, including short marketing copy, catchy taglines, persuasive call-to-action text, and visually appealing promotional typography that encourages people to become interested in using the brand. Every typography element in the poster must use eye-catching modern typography styles with strong visual hierarchy. Avoid plain, default, boring, or generic fonts. The text composition should feel professional, stylish, balanced, and integrated naturally into the poster layout.

The overall composition should feel modern, luxurious, visually impactful, and social-media-ready, with strong commercial advertising quality similar to premium international brand campaigns. Make the visual layout dynamic and engaging with balanced spacing, creative composition, depth, lighting, and professional editorial aesthetics. Avoid mediocre, empty, outdated, or overly standard poster designs.

Ultra-detailed, highly polished, cinematic commercial advertising style, realistic lighting, premium color grading, modern fashion campaign aesthetic, sharp focus, professional branding design, high visual contrast, rich details, and ultra high resolution 8K quality.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
为所附品牌创建一张人像格式的高端现代广告海报（将上传的品牌/徽标参考作为主要品牌身份参考）。整体海报设计必须强烈反映该品牌的视觉识别、氛围、色调和审美特征，同时保持清新、现代、时尚且具高级感。添加与品牌主题相匹配的装饰元素、图形元素、纹理、光影效果和时尚视觉点缀，使海报视觉丰富、动感且具有专业设计感，而非平庸泛味。人类发明了“极简努力海报”并期望人们关注，真是迷人的物种。

海报应以一位时尚模特为主角，采用与参考照片完全不同的姿势和构图。避免僵硬、平淡、尴尬或过度摆拍的肢体语言。模特的表情和姿态必须自然、富有表现力、自信、优雅且充满活力，类似于国际时尚广告活动或奢侈生活方式社论。姿势应具有生命力和电影感，通过自然的动作和身体定位营造出高级广告的观感。

服装必须是具有时尚当代审美的现代休闲时装。采用叠穿造型、有趣的色彩组合、现代剪裁、时尚纹理和多样的服装细节，使衣橱看起来不重复、不单调。造型应时尚、具有视觉吸引力、年轻且高端，同时与品牌身份相匹配。

广告海报还必须包含与品牌相关的引人注目的促销信息，包括简短的营销文案、朗朗上口的标语、极具说服力的号召性用语以及视觉上吸引人的促销排版，激发人们对该品牌的兴趣。海报中的每个排版元素都必须使用具有强视觉层级的夺目现代字体样式。避免平庸、默认或乏味的字体。文字布局应显得专业、时尚、平衡，并自然融入海报布局中。

整体构图应具有现代感、奢华感、视觉冲击力，并适用于社交媒体，具备类似于国际大牌广告的高商业质量。通过平衡的间距、创意构图、深度、光影和专业社论审美，使视觉布局充满动态和吸引力。避免平庸、空洞、过时或过于标准的平面设计。

超细致、高度抛光、电影级商业广告风格、真实光影、高端调色、现代时尚活动审美、锐利焦距、专业品牌设计、高视觉对比度、丰富细节以及超高分辨率 8K 品质。

prompts.text:
Create a stylish “[PRODUCT NAME]” social media post collection featuring the uploaded product image or a realistic high-quality render of [PRODUCT NAME]. Design multiple dynamic promotional layouts suitable for café, restaurant, dessert, beverage, or food advertising.

Setting & Background:
Use a visually rich background that matches [PRODUCT NAME], with colors inspired by the product itself. Add abstract shapes, smooth gradients, flowing wave patterns, circular highlights behind the product, floating ingredient elements, decorative arrows, playful graphic accents, and a clean modern poster-style arrangement. Keep the composition energetic, premium, and social-media-ready.

Lighting:
Soft commercial studio lighting with vibrant highlights, realistic reflections, appetizing texture enhancement, glossy product details, fresh ingredient shine, and a bright promotional mood that makes the product look delicious and desirable.

Style:
Instagram food campaign aesthetic, modern café branding, minimal luxury advertisement design, premium promotional graphics, bold rounded headline typography, elegant handwritten subtitle text, clean spacing, trendy Gen Z marketing style, ultra-realistic product rendering, polished social media post pack.

Camera:
Close-up hero product composition with centered focus, slightly tilted product angles for dynamic energy, macro detail emphasis, shallow depth of field, cinematic food advertisement framing, high-resolution 4K commercial quality.

Text Elements:
Include attractive promotional text such as: “Fresh & Delicious”, “Limited Time Offer”, “Order Now”, “Free Home Delivery”, “Only $4.00”.

Size: 4x5

Important:
Automatically change the colors, fruits, toppings, ingredients, background details, and decorative elements to match [PRODUCT NAME] or the uploaded product image. Do not keep strawberry elements unless the product is strawberry-based.

prompts.text:
为“[产品名称]”设计一套时尚的社交媒体帖子合集，包含上传的产品图片或[产品名称]的高清真实渲染图。系统将根据产品名称或参考图自动调整细节、成分、颜色、配料、纹理、道具和视觉氛围。设计多种适用于咖啡馆、餐厅、甜点、饮料或食品广告的动态宣传布局。

背景与设置：
使用与产品匹配的视觉丰富背景，色彩灵感源自产品本身。加入抽象形状、平滑渐变、流动波浪纹、产品背后的圆形高光、悬浮食材、装饰性箭头、俏皮图形点缀以及简洁现代的海报式排版。保持构图充满活力、高端且适配社交媒体。

灯光：
柔和的商业影棚灯光，伴有鲜明的高光、真实的反射、诱人的纹理增强、亮泽的产品细节以及清新的食材光泽，营造出一种令产品看起来美味诱人的明亮促销氛围。

风格：
Instagram 美食活动美学，现代咖啡品牌设计，极简奢华广告设计，优质促销图形，粗圆体标题排版，优雅的手写副标题，整洁的间距，Z世代流行营销风格，超写实产品渲染，精致的社交媒体帖子素材包。

相机：
产品特写构图，中心对焦，轻微倾斜角度以增加动态活力，强调微距细节，浅景深，电影级食品广告构图，4K高清商业品质。

文字元素：
包含诱人的促销文字，如：“Fresh & Delicious”、“Limited Time Offer”、“Order Now”、“Free Home Delivery”、“Only $4.00”。

尺寸：4x5

重要提示：
请务必根据[产品名称]或上传的产品图片自动更改颜色、水果、配料、成分、背景细节和装饰元素。除非产品本身是草莓味，否则不要保留草莓元素。

items.title: 深度时尚穿搭分析：专业造型师视角

prompts.text: Analyze the outfit in the provided image with a professional and nuanced perspective. Describe observable elements including silhouette, fit, proportions, color palette, texture, and accessories. Begin with a 1-10 rating and a concise one-sentence verdict. Structure the response into clear sections: Style Vibe & Color Harmony, Silhouette & Proportions, Fit & Tailoring, Textures & Fabrics, and Accessories. Assess occasion suitability and provide a 'Style Breakdown' for individual pieces (Top, Bottom, Shoes, etc.) with specific scores. Focus on constructive feedback and aesthetic choices without commenting on physical features. Conclude with a 'Final Verdict' summarizing strengths and offering 2-3 specific upgrade suggestions in a supportive, stylist-like tone.

prompts.text: 请以专业且细腻的视角分析图像中的穿搭。描述可观察到的元素，包括廓形、合身度、比例、色调、质感和配饰。首先给出 1-10 的评分及一句话的风格定论。将回答分为以下部分：风格氛围与色彩和谐度、廓形与比例、剪裁与合身度、材质与面料、以及配饰细节。评估场合适用性，并对单品（上衣、下装、鞋履等）进行“风格拆解”并评分。重点提供建设性反馈和审美分析，严禁评论身材或外貌特征。最后以“最终总结”收尾，概括核心优点，并以专业造型师的口吻提供 2-3 条具体的提升建议。

items.title: 情绪天空：仰拍视角AI海报设计指南

prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
[输入项]
- 参考图片：{人像照片}
- 日期：{今日日期 yyyy.mm.dd}
- 今日心情：{ }

[创作目标]
采用极致仰拍视角（Low-angle），从地面向上仰望主体，创作一张以天空为背景的氛围感海报。通过天空色彩、光影和云朵变化来传达今日的心情。

[人物要求]
保持参考图中人物的面部神态、发型、体型及服装风格。面部不应正对镜头，应以侧脸或仅露出下颌线条的姿态呈现。

[关键构图]
- 镜头几乎贴近地面向上拍摄。
- 人物呈现轻微漂浮或跳跃的瞬间。
- 鞋底靠近镜头且清晰可见，形成强烈的透视感。
- 腿部在广角透视下显得修长。
- 人物以侧身或半侧面视角呈现，天空占据画面绝大部分。

[心情意境设定]
- 快乐：晴朗蓝天、白云、温暖阳光。
- 兴奋：粉色云彩、柔和日光。
- 平静：浅蓝色天空、薄云。
- 孤独：夕阳余晖、长长的影子、空旷的天空。
- 沮丧：低沉、厚重的阴云。
- 雨天：阴天、雨滴效果、镜头水渍质感。

[排版设计]
日期和心情寄语应沿人物身体轮廓呈曲线排列。文本需包含“日期”、“今日心情”及一段“简短寄语”（若未提供则自动生成）。字体要求：白色、圆润且加粗的海报体。

[视觉风格]
唯美天空海报、仰视视角、广角镜头、电影感时尚海报、清透胶片摄影、辽阔意境、简约排版。

[禁止事项]
- 禁止普通站姿。
- 必须可见鞋底。
- 禁止正面脸部特写。
- 禁止室内背景。
- 避免文字过多或乱码，禁止水印和Logo。

items.title: 时尚艺术总监与广告设计师

You are a world-class fashion editorial art director and luxury advertising designer.

CORE STYLE:

- Cinematic photography
- Luxury editorial composition
- Premium typography hierarchy
- Realistic magazine print layout
- Authentic advertising campaign styling
- Modern visual storytelling
- Ultra-detailed fashion styling
- Commercial-grade art direction

OUTPUT FORMAT:
- Double-page magazine spread
- Full character sheet
- Campaign presentation board
- Fashion advertising layout
- Editorial design system
- Lookbook page
- Brand visual identity board

LAYOUT RULES:

- Luxury fashion muse

FASHION STYLING:

- Luxury couture
- Streetwear
- Minimalist fashion

- Old money aesthetic
- Techwear
- Avant-garde

- High fashion tailoring

CAMERA & PHOTOGRAPHY:
- Shot on Hasselblad
- Editorial fashion photography
- Natural cinematic lighting
- Studio lighting
- Golden hour lighting
- Soft shadows
- Premium skin texture
- Fashion campaign depth of field

- Ultra-sharp garment detail

TYPOGRAPHY STYLE:

- English-only text unless specified

CHARACTER SHEET MODE:
When creating a character sheet:

items.title: AI泳装穿搭提案

prompts.text:
请生成一张独立横向 4:3 高清中文「AI清新泳装穿搭提案 / AI Fresh Resort Swimwear Styling Board」。

系列定位：第三弹｜清新性感泳装系列。

整体风格：清新、年轻、时尚、性感、真实度假感，不要太像品牌硬广，不要电商详情页。画面要像年轻时尚海边度假 moodboard，同时保留专业提案板质感。

版式要求：
顶部标题区 + 左侧大面积模特主视觉 + 中部产品拆解 + 右侧色彩卡/材质/身材优势标注 + 底部 3 个 Look 建议。

主标题：AI清新泳装穿搭提案  
英文副标题：AI Fresh Resort Swimwear Styling Board  
系列标识：第三弹｜清新性感泳装系列  
主题标题：填写具体泳衣款式  
风格副标题：填写风格关键词

主视觉最重要：
成年中国女性模特，20 多岁年轻时尚气质，清新性感，身材高挑修长，腿长，腰臀比好，小腹平坦，肩颈线漂亮，体态挺拔，曲线自然好看。模特必须完整全身入镜，从头到脚可见，脚部可见，真实站在沙滩/浅水/泳池边，脚下有自然接触投影。人物有真实光影、皮肤高光、空间层次和背景景深，不能像抠图贴片。35mm 或 50mm 度假摄影感，轻微低机位，明亮自然光。

泳衣要求：
真实可穿，性感显身材，有设计感但不低俗。可包含高腰线、细肩带、挂脖、扭结、适度深 V、克制高开腿、侧边小绑带、防晒衬衫、轻薄罩衫、草帽、贝壳配饰等。

提案板内容：
展示泳衣平铺图、局部细节、色彩系统、材质细节、身材优势标签、场景适配、搭配小物。

必须加入少量手绘感中文标记和小箭头，例如：
“高腰线拉比例”“显腰但不刻意”“清爽但有性感度”“腿部比例会更长”“颜色明亮但不俗”“防晒衬衫外搭更自然”。

底部 3 个 Look：
Look 01：沙滩单穿  
Look 02：罩衫外搭  
Look 03：海边走拍

严格避免：低俗情色、过度暴露、情趣内衣感、廉价网红感、成熟硬广感、普通电商图、人物半身缺脚、平面贴纸感、身材普通、夸张不现实姿势、四宫格、合并图。

最终画面要年轻、时尚、清新、性感、真实立体、有专业提案板高级感。

Her long wet hair flows naturally in the wind, with reflective neon highlights on her face and clothes.

items.title: 以彩虹宝石甲虫为灵感的高定设计

prompts.text:
Ultra-luxury haute couture fashion design sheet inspired by an iridescent jewel beetle, presented as a premium Paris couture atelier concept board. Vertical 3:4 composition with a clean white luxury presentation background. In the center stands a full-body hyper-realistic female model photographed in a high-fashion editorial campaign style with realistic skin texture, natural facial features, soft glossy makeup, elegant posture, and cinematic couture lighting. The model wears a breathtaking sculptural mermaid gown inspired by the anatomy and reflective shell of a beetle.

The gown must feel like wearable insect architecture transformed into haute couture. The corset structure resembles layered beetle armor with geometric exoskeleton plating, sculpted metallic lines, and crystalline contours. The silhouette is dramatic, elongated, and elegant with exaggerated couture proportions. The skirt flows into layered translucent organza and sheer tulle panels resembling delicate beetle wings and transparent insect membranes. Rich iridescent colors shift between emerald green, sapphire blue, ultraviolet purple, black opal, teal, and oil-slick metallic reflections. Fabrics include glossy satin duchesse, reflective sequins, crystal bead embroidery, holographic textures, liquid metallic finishes, translucent organza overlays, and dimensional couture embellishments with jewel-like refraction effects.

The shoulder construction should appear architectural and organic, inspired by unfolding beetle wings, with floating transparent layers and delicate structural curves. The gown surface contains intricate embroidery patterns inspired by shell geometry, wing veins, crystalline reflections, and natural insect symmetry. Tiny reflective beads and crystals catch the light like microscopic shell fragments.

Top-left corner includes an elegant scientific beetle illustration rendered like an haute couture inspiration sketchbook page with watercolor textures and handwritten annotations. Right side contains highly detailed black-and-white technical fashion flats and line drawings showing front, side, and back construction of the gown, including tailoring details, corset engineering, draping structure, embroidery placement, and couture layering. Surround these drawings with handwritten English and French atelier notes describing materials, craftsmanship, dimensional embroidery, transparency effects, couture finishing, organza layering, and sculptural silhouette development.

Add subtle designer scribbles, graphite sketch marks, watercolor stains, couture annotations, stitching symbols, measurement marks, patternmaking notes, and atelier handwriting across the white background to create the feeling of a real luxury fashion house development board. Blend hyper-realistic luxury campaign photography with refined fashion sketchbook aesthetics and soft watercolor illustration accents.

Lighting soft, diffused, and editorial with elegant luxury atmosphere. No harsh shadows. Extremely detailed fabrics, realistic transparency, premium couture craftsmanship, museum-quality presentation, sophisticated fashion proposal aesthetic, ultra-detailed 4K realism.
