items.title: 游戏角色设定档案总览

prompts.text:
Please create a high-completion, high-consistency "Character Archive Board" suitable for serialized release based on the [Theme / Worldview / Character Setting].

This is not an ordinary character illustration or a single character poster, but an official character setting overview combining "main character display + skill action display + expression setting + three-view drawing description + weapon and equipment display + color palette description + brand title system". The overall image should look like a standard display page in a game art book, character data page, project proposal board, or IP visual development document, possessing both character charm and a clear sense of information organization and setting description.

【Basic Settings】
- Theme / Worldview: 【Theme】
- Project Name / Brand Name: 【Brand Name】
- Character Name: 【Character Name】
- Identity / Profession / Faction: 【Character Identity】
- Core Temperament: 【Character Temperament, e.g., cold, elegant, heroic, wild, mysterious, fierce】
- Combat Position: 【Combat Position, e.g., warrior, knight, mage, assassin, gunman, guardian】
- Weapon Type: 【Weapon Type】
- Elemental Attribute / Ability Direction: 【Ability Direction】
- Main Color: 【Main Color】
- Auxiliary Color: 【Auxiliary Color】
- Accent Color: 【Accent Color】
- Style Direction: 【Style Direction, e.g., anime game original art, light impasto character setting, fantasy epic, future sci-fi, oriental fantasy】
- Aspect Ratio: 【Aspect Ratio, recommended 3:2 landscape】

【Auto-Completion Rules】
If the user has not filled in the complete basic character settings, or if some fields are empty, please do not stop generating, but instead automatically deduce and complete a set of complete, reasonable, and unified character settings based on the 【Theme】【Worldview】【Character Identity】【Combat Position】【Weapon Type】【Ability Direction】【Main Color】【Style Direction】.

During auto-completion, you should prioritize generating the following content and ensure logical consistency among them:
- Character gender tendency
- Age sense (youth / young adult / adult / mature)
- Body type characteristics (slender, muscular, light, burly)
- Facial temperament (calm, sharp, gentle, wild, noble, mysterious)
- Hairstyle and hair color
- Clothing structure (robe, armor, cloak, light outfit, uniform, formal dress, techwear)
- Armor and accessory ratio
- Weapon appearance style
- Skill effect form
- Expression tendency
- Clothing and equipment details in the three-view drawing

Auto-completion is not a random patchwork, but forming a unified scheme around the same character positioning. The final character must have clear recognizability and highly match the worldview, profession, color scheme, and combat style.

【Auto-Combination Suggestion Logic】
When the user has not explicitly filled in character details, please prioritize combining the basic character settings according to the following logic:
1. Determine the general direction of the character based on the 【Worldview】, such as fantasy, sci-fi, oriental fantasy, steampunk, future city, mythological epic;
2. Determine the character's body type, clothing structure, armor degree, and weapon temperament based on the 【Character Identity / Combat Position】;
3. Determine the skill action form, effect trajectory, combat posture, and equipment details based on the 【Weapon Type / Ability Direction】;
4. Determine the clothing color scheme, weapon material, energy color, and overall visual recognition based on the 【Main Color / Auxiliary Color / Accent Color】;
5. Unify the character's facial shaping, clothing language, light and shadow processing, and module expression based on the 【Style Direction】.

If the user only provides a small number of keywords, a complete character setting should also be automatically generated. For example:
- Only given "Flame Female Knight" -> Automatically complete the age sense, cloak, red-gold-black color scheme, spear or greatsword, flame skill effects, heroic expression;
- Only given "Ice Prince" -> Automatically complete the blue-silver-white color scheme, light armor or ceremonial armor, longsword or scepter, ice crystal skills, calm demeanor.

【Image Structure Requirements】
The entire image uses a landscape character setting description board layout, organizing the image with a "left main, right auxiliary" structure:

1. Left main visual area:
- Place a high-completion large-size main character standing illustration as the visual core of the entire image
- The character's posture is complete, with strong recognizability and character charm
- Details of clothing, armor, cloak, patterns, accessories, weapons are clear
- The character should reflect clear professional attributes and worldview affiliation
- Can include a small amount of faded character virtual shadows or background auxiliary outlines to enhance layering, but must not overshadow the main subject

2. Top-left title and introduction area:
- Display a large English title or series title, such as the series name / brand name the character belongs to
- Paired with the character's Chinese name, subtitle, faction, profession, or identity tags
- Add a brief character background introduction text to create a data page feel
- Title typography is concise and powerful, with a brand visual system feel

3. Top-right skill display area:
- Display a set of small character skill action images, numbering about 4~6
- Including action moments such as dash, slash, casting, burst, ultimate skill, area attack
- Each action should retain character recognition features and skill effect styles
- The skill module should look like an action breakdown display or combat illustration

4. Middle-right expression display area:
- Display about 4 character head expressions
- Such as calm, angry, surprised, contemplative, sneering, eyes closed
- The expression images should be unified in style with the main standing illustration, used to supplement the layers of the character's personality

5. Bottom three-view drawing area:
- Display the character's front, side, and back three-view drawings
- Used to clearly explain the clothing structure, cloak outline, armor design, back of the hairstyle, shoe and boot design
- The three-view drawings should be relatively neat, clear, and unified, like a formal setting draft

6. Right-side weapon and additional settings area:
- Display the character's main weapon separately, adding partial breakdowns or multiple angles when necessary
- Paired with a brief weapon name and descriptive text
- Can include small supplementary elements such as faction emblems, element icons, character crests

7. Color palette area:
- Use 3~5 color blocks to display the character's main color scheme system
- The color palette should be consistent with the character's clothing, weapon, and effect colors
- Strengthen the character's visual recognizability

【Visual Style Requirements】
- The overall background is mainly light gray-white, fog white, and cool white, clean and restrained, with ample white space
- The page has the temperament of an official art book, game data page, and character specification board
- The image has both a exquisite illustration feel and a rational typography and manual feel
- Module boundaries are clear, layout alignment is explicit, and information zoning is reasonable
- The main subject is finely drawn, and the styles of expressions, actions, weapons, and three-view drawings are unified
- Light and shadow are clean, do not be overly realistic or overly heavy
- Maintain a light UI feel, modern feel, brand feel, and proposal feel
- Do not make it into a messy collage, nor an overly flashy poster

【Output Target】
Generate a character setting archive board suitable for serialized reuse, allowing viewers to see at a glance the character's image, professional positioning, skill style, equipment characteristics, and worldview affiliation. The overall work must simultaneously possess "strong visual appeal" and "high information organization".

【Execution Principles】
- If the user fills in completely, prioritize faithful execution of the user's settings;
- If the user only fills in partial content, complete the missing fields;
- If the user fills in very little, automatically combine a complete set of basic character settings;
- Whether manually set or automatically completed, the final character must have a unified, complete, and serially expandable visual logic.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
请根据【主题 / 世界观 / 角色设定】，创作一张高完成度、高统一性、适合系列化发布的「角色设定档案板 / Character Archive Board」。

这不是普通角色插画，也不是单张立绘海报，而是一张结合“主立绘展示 + 技能动作展示 + 表情设定 + 三视图说明 + 武器装备展示 + 色板说明 + 品牌标题系统”的官方角色设定总览图。整体画面应像游戏设定集、角色资料页、项目提案板或IP视觉开发文档中的标准展示页，既有角色魅力，又有清晰的信息组织与设定说明感。

【基础设定】
- 主题 / 世界观：【主题】
- 项目名 / 品牌名：【品牌名】
- 角色名：【角色名】
- 身份 / 职业 / 阵营：【角色身份】
- 核心气质：【角色气质，例如冷峻、优雅、英勇、野性、神秘、暴烈】
- 战斗定位：【战斗定位，例如战士、骑士、法师、刺客、枪手、守护者】
- 武器类型：【武器类型】
- 元素属性 / 能力方向：【能力方向】
- 主色调：【主色调】
- 辅助色：【辅助色】
- 点缀色：【点缀色】
- 风格方向：【风格方向，例如二次元游戏原画、轻厚涂角色设定、奇幻史诗、未来科幻、东方幻想】
- 画幅比例：【画幅比例，建议 3:2 横版】

【自动补全规则】
如果用户没有填写完整的角色基础设定，或部分字段为空，请不要停止生成，而是根据【主题】【世界观】【角色身份】【战斗定位】【武器类型】【能力方向】【主色调】【风格方向】自动推导并补全一套完整、合理、统一的角色设定。

自动补全时，应优先生成以下内容，并确保彼此逻辑一致：
- 角色性别倾向
- 年龄感（少年 / 青年 / 成年 / 成熟）
- 体型特征（修长、健壮、轻盈、魁梧等）
- 面部气质（冷静、锐利、温柔、狂野、高贵、神秘等）
- 发型与发色
- 服装结构（长袍、战甲、披风、轻装、制服、礼装、机能装等）
- 盔甲与配饰比例
- 武器外观风格
- 技能特效形态
- 表情倾向
- 三视图中的服装和装备细节

自动补全不是随机拼凑，而是要围绕同一个角色定位形成统一方案。最终角色必须具备明确辨识度，并与世界观、职业、配色和战斗方式高度匹配。

【自动组合建议逻辑】
当用户未明确填写角色细节时，请优先依据以下逻辑组合角色基础设定：
1. 根据【世界观】确定角色的大方向，例如奇幻、科幻、东方幻想、蒸汽朋克、未来都市、神话史诗等；
2. 根据【角色身份 / 战斗定位】决定角色的体型、服装结构、盔甲程度和武器气质；
3. 根据【武器类型 / 能力方向】决定技能动作形式、特效走向、战斗姿态和装备细节；
4. 根据【主色调 / 辅助色 / 点缀色】决定服装配色、武器材质、能量颜色与整体视觉识别；
5. 根据【风格方向】统一角色脸部塑造、服饰语言、光影处理和模块表现方式。

如果用户只提供了少量关键词，也应自动生成完整角色设定。例如：
- 只给“火焰女骑士” → 自动补出年龄感、披风、红金黑配色、长枪或大剑、火焰技能特效、英气表情等；
- 只给“冰系王子” → 自动补出蓝白银配色、轻甲或礼甲、长剑或权杖、冰晶技能、冷静神态等。

【画面结构要求】
整张图采用横版角色设定说明板式布局，以“左主右辅”的结构组织画面：

1. 左侧主视觉区：
- 放置一张高完成度的大尺寸角色主立绘，作为整张图的视觉核心
- 角色姿态完整，具有强烈识别度和人物魅力
- 服装、盔甲、披风、纹样、配饰、武器等细节清晰
- 角色应体现明确的职业属性和世界观归属
- 可以带有少量淡化的角色虚影或背景辅助轮廓，以增强层次，但不能抢主体

2. 左上标题与简介区：
- 显示大号英文标题或系列标题，例如角色所属系列名 / 品牌名
- 搭配角色中文名、副标题、阵营、职业或身份标签
- 添加一段简洁的角色背景介绍文字，形成资料页感
- 标题排版简洁有力，具有品牌视觉系统感

3. 右上技能展示区：
- 展示一组角色技能动作小图，数量约 4~6 个
- 包括突进、挥击、施法、爆发、大招、范围攻击等动作瞬间
- 每个动作都应保留角色识别特征和技能特效风格
- 技能模块像动作分解展示或战斗说明图

4. 中右表情展示区：
- 展示约 4 个角色头像表情
- 如平静、愤怒、惊讶、沉思、冷笑、闭眼等
- 表情图应与主立绘风格统一，用于补充角色性格层次

5. 下方三视图区：
- 展示角色正面、侧面、背面三视图
- 用于清晰说明服装结构、披风轮廓、盔甲设计、发型背面、鞋靴造型等
- 三视图相对规整、清晰、统一，像正式设定稿

6. 右侧武器与附加设定区：
- 单独展示角色主武器，必要时可增加局部拆分或多个角度
- 搭配简短武器名称与说明文案
- 可加入阵营徽记、元素图标、角色纹章等小型补充元素

7. 色板区：
- 使用 3~5 个色块展示角色主配色体系
- 色板应与角色服装、武器、特效颜色保持一致
- 强化角色的视觉识别度

【视觉风格要求】
- 整体背景以浅灰白、雾白、冷白为主，干净克制，留白充足
- 页面具有官方设定集、游戏资料页、角色规格说明板的气质
- 画面既有精美插画感，也有理性排版和说明书感
- 模块边界清晰，版式对齐明确，信息分区合理
- 主体绘制精细，表情、动作、武器、三视图风格统一
- 光影干净，不要过度写实或过度厚重
- 保持轻UI化、现代感、品牌感、提案感
- 不要做成杂乱拼贴，也不要做成过度花哨的海报

【输出目标】
生成一张适合系列化复用的角色设定档案板，让观者一眼就能看出角色形象、职业定位、技能风格、装备特点和世界观归属。整体必须同时具备“强视觉吸引力”和“高信息组织度”。

【执行原则】
- 如果用户填写完整，则优先忠实执行用户设定；
- 如果用户只填写部分内容，则补全缺失字段；
- 如果用户填写非常少，则自动组合出一套完整角色基础设定；
- 无论是手动设定还是自动补全，最终角色都必须具备统一、完整、可系列化扩展的视觉逻辑。

prompts.text:
Ultra-modern high-end skincare advertising collage featuring four beautiful young Asian women, each portrait styled in a separate geometric section of a dynamic diagonal layout. Clean editorial beauty photography with soft natural skin texture, glowing healthy complexion, and subtle makeup. Bright vibrant color blocking design using pink, yellow, cyan, and coral tones. Minimal abstract background shapes, smooth gradients, and modern graphic design composition. Studio-quality lighting, fashion magazine aesthetic, premium cosmetic campaign feel. Each woman posed confidently in different angles, smiling softly, fresh and youthful vibe. Balanced symmetry with sharp diagonal divisions and circular portrait frames. Highly polished commercial beauty branding style, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, 4k resolution.

items.title: 高端橙汁商业海报大片

prompts.text:
Create a bold, high-end commercial poster for a premium orange juice brand, shot in a hyper-realistic studio environment with a strong emphasis on freshness, precision, and striking visual appeal.
Hero Composition:
A sleek transparent bottle filled with rich, vibrant orange juice stands at the center. The label is minimal, modern, and premium, featuring a clean orange graphic with refined typography. The bottle is topped with a matte black cap, enhanced by subtle highlights and realistic reflections.
Action & Story:
Two hands wearing matte black gloves interact with the product:
One hand firmly grips the bottle from the top
The other slices through a thick, juicy orange using a sharp stainless steel knife
The cut is captured mid-action, showcasing the juicy pulp and fresh citrus texture. A few orange slices are placed at the base, slightly scattered to create a natural yet styled composition.
Lighting & Mood:
Background: deep, rich green gradient with cinematic falloff
Surface: dark matte table with soft, controlled reflections
Lighting: dramatic studio setup
Strong key light from one side for depth
Soft fill light for balance
Crisp highlights on the bottle and knife
Deep, clean shadows for contrast
Typography Layout:

Top corner:
Clean, modern brand name (e.g., “VITRA”, “FRESCO”, or “NATURO”) in white
Bottom section:
Small line: “Not your average juice”

Large bold headline: “PURE ORANGE. NO COMPROMISE.”
Typography should feel modern, bold, and premium with a strong visual hierarchy. Use a rich orange tone for the headline to complement the juice.

Visual Style:

High-end food advertising aesthetic

Cinematic, bold, and contrast-driven

Ultra-sharp details and textures

Premium editorial look (like a global campaign)

Clean yet powerful composition

Output Requirements:

4K resolution

Photorealistic, advertisement-grade quality

Sharp focus, rich contrast, high dynamic range

prompts.text:
创作一张大胆、高端的优质橙汁品牌商业海报，在超写实的摄影棚环境中拍摄，强烈强调新鲜感、精准度和引人注目的视觉吸引力。
核心构图：
一款流线型的透明玻璃瓶，装满浓郁、鲜艳的橙汁，矗立在正中央。标签极简、现代且高端，采用干净的橙色图形与精致的排版。瓶顶配有哑光黑色瓶盖，通过微妙的高光和逼真的反射得到增强。
动作与故事：
两只戴着哑光黑手套的手与产品互动：
一只手从顶部紧紧握住瓶子
另一只手用一把锋利的不锈钢刀切开一个厚实多汁的橙子
切割动作在半空中被捕捉，展现出多汁的果肉和新鲜的柑橘纹理。底部放置了几个橙子切片，略微散落以营造自然而又经过精心设计的构图。
光线与氛围：
背景：深沉浓郁的绿色渐变，带有电影感的衰减效果
表面：深色哑光桌面，带有柔和、受控的反射
光线：戏剧性的摄影棚布光设置
一侧强烈的主光以增加深度
柔和的补光以平衡画面
瓶子和刀子上清脆的高光
深邃、干净的阴影以形成对比
排版布局：

顶部角落：
干净、现代的品牌名称（例如，“VITRA”、“FRESCO”或“NATURO”），白色
底部区域：
小字行：“Not your average juice”

大号粗体标题：“PURE ORANGE. NO COMPROMISE.”
排版应感觉现代、大胆且高端，具有强烈的视觉层次感。标题使用浓郁的橙色色调以与橙汁相呼应。
视觉风格：

高端食品广告美学

电影感、大胆且以对比为导向

超清晰的细节与纹理

高端杂志大片感（宛如全球性广告活动）

干净而有力的构图
输出要求：

4K分辨率

照片级逼真，广告级品质

焦点锐利，对比丰富，高动态范围

items.title: 逆光白纱的日系浪漫

prompts.text: 9:16, Japanese-style film photograph, Fujifilm aesthetic, shot on pushed Fuji Pro 400H at ISO 800 prominent visible film grain throughout, warm and intimate. A stunning Korean female idol wearing a sexy modern ivory wedding dress, photographed outdoors in an open wildflower meadow during golden hour, strong backlight from the setting sun behind her.   She stands in a confident body-twist pose — upper body facing the camera, weight shifted to her right hip, left knee slightly bent. Her dress is a form-fitting mermaid silhouette with a deep V-neckline revealing her collarbones, ultra-thin   spaghetti straps, a dramatic open back exposing her entire back, and a thigh-high slit on the right side revealing her long leg as the skirt fabric parts. The dress is made of ivory silk satin with a sheer tulle overlay that catches the   backlight, creating a luminous glow. A delicate pearl waist chain sits at her narrow waist. A single-layer cathedral-length veil of translucent tulle extends behind her head, caught by the wind and billowing upward like a white sail — sunlight    streaming through the veil creates a massive, dreamy halo of diffused light around her head and shoulders.   She looks directly at the camera with a radiant, genuine Duchenne smile — her eyes crinkle warmly at the corners, teeth showing, eyes bright and happy, as if someone she loves just called her name. Her gaze is warm and inviting with a subtle   playful spark. Her left hand is raised, fingers gently touching the floating veil near her face, an effortless gesture that's both elegant and natural. Her right hand rests at her side near the slit of the dress.   The backlight is powerful and golden — the low-angle sun at about 10-15 degrees directly behind her creates:   1. A bright golden halo through her veil that wraps around her head and upper body   2. Strong rim light outlining her hair, bare shoulders, and back in warm gold   3. An angelic ring of light in her wind-blown hair   4. Subtle subsurface scattering on her ear edges and fingers   5. The tulle overlay of her dress glowing translucent gold where sunlight passes through   6. Natural warm lens flare with soft golden light streaks entering the frame   Her face is lit by soft natural fill light from environmental reflection — cool pink-toned Fujifilm skin that glows with health and warmth, no harsh shadows. Her hair is wind-swept, dark brown strands flying freely, each one outlined in gold   by the backlight.   Background: completely dissolved into creamy bokeh at f/1.4 — soft washes of golden-green meadow, blurred wildflowers, distant tree silhouettes, and a warm overexposed sky. Everything behind her melts into impressionistic color fields.   Fuji Pro 400H pushed to ISO 800 color science — prominent visible film grain (0.4-0.5) coating the entire image, especially noticeable in shadow areas. Cool pink skin tones (Fujifilm signature), greens rendered in fresh teal-cyan, highlights   in warm peach-gold (from backlight), shadows leaning violet-blue. Low contrast (0.8), slightly lifted black point for a gentle foggy film feel. The grain adds texture and warmth — it feels like a real photograph you'd find in a Japanese   fashion magazine.   Strong natural vignette (0.35) drawing the eye toward her luminous face and the halo around her. 35mm lens at f/1.4, shallow depth of field with characteristically rounded Fujinon bokeh, slight warm barrel distortion at edges.A breeze lifts her veil and dress. She is laughing at someone behind the camera. The whole frame radiates joy, warmth, and confident beauty a sundrenched, grainy, imperfectly perfect moment.   Masterpiece, best quality, editorial bridal photography, Japanese film aesthetic, Fujifilm pushed grain look, 8K UHD, photorealistic, accurate golden backlight rendering, translucent veil light transmission, individual hair strands in   backlight, natural Duchenne smile with eye crinkles, visible film grain throughout.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 9:16，日系胶片摄影，富士美学，在ISO 800下迫冲富士Pro 400H拍摄，全画面具有明显的可见胶片颗粒，温暖而亲密。一位迷人的韩国女偶像穿着性感的现代象牙白婚纱，在黄金时刻于户外开阔的野花草地中被拍摄，身后落日形成强烈的逆光。   她以自信的身体扭转姿势站立——上半身面向镜头，重心移至右臀，左膝微曲。她的连衣裙是贴合身材的鱼尾轮廓，深V领露出锁骨，极细的   细吊带，戏剧性的露背设计露出整个背部，右侧有开到大腿根部的开叉，随着裙摆分开露出她修长的腿。这件连衣裙由象牙色丝绸缎面制成，带有捕捉   逆光的透明薄纱覆盖层，创造出明亮的光辉。一条精致的珍珠腰链位于她纤细的腰部。一层教堂长度的半透明薄纱头纱从她脑后延伸，被风吹起像白帆一样向上鼓起——阳光    穿透头纱，在她头部和肩部周围形成一个巨大的、梦幻的漫射光晕。   她直视镜头，露出灿烂、真诚的杜兴微笑——她的眼角温暖地弯曲，露出牙齿，眼神明亮而快乐，仿佛她爱的人刚刚呼唤了她的名字。她的目光温暖而诱人，带着一丝微妙   俏皮的光芒。她的左手抬起，手指轻轻触碰脸旁漂浮的头纱，这是一个毫不费力、既优雅又自然的姿态。她的右手放在身侧靠近裙子开叉的地方。   逆光强烈而金黄——位于她正后方约10-15度低角度的太阳产生了：   1. 透过她头纱的明亮金色光晕，环绕着她的头部和上半身   2. 强烈的轮廓光，用温暖的金色勾勒出她的头发、裸露的肩膀和背部   3. 在她被风吹动的头发中形成天使般的光环   4. 耳朵边缘和手指上微妙的次表面散射   5. 阳光穿过的地方，她裙子的薄纱覆盖层发出半透明的金色光芒   6. 自然的温暖镜头眩光，带有进入画面的柔和金色光线   她的脸部由来自环境反射的柔和自然补光照亮——冷粉调的富士肤色散发出健康和温暖的光泽，没有生硬的阴影。她的头发随风飘动，深棕色的发丝自由飞舞，每一根都被逆光   勾勒出金色的边缘。   背景：在f/1.4光圈下完全融化为奶油般的散景——金黄色草地的柔和渲染、模糊的野花、远处的树木剪影，以及温暖过曝的天空。她身后的一切都融化成印象派的色块。   富士Pro 400H迫冲至ISO 800的色彩科学——明显的可见胶片颗粒（0.4-0.5）覆盖整个图像，在阴影区域尤为明显。冷粉肤色（富士标志性特征），绿色呈现为清新的青蓝色，高光   为温暖的蜜桃金（来自逆光），阴影偏向紫蓝色。低对比度（0.8），稍微提升黑位以营造柔和的雾面胶片感。颗粒增加了质感和温度——感觉就像你在日本   时尚杂志上能看到的一张真实照片。   强烈的自然暗角（0.35）将视线吸引到她明亮的脸庞和周围的光晕上。35mm镜头在f/1.4光圈下，浅景深具有典型的圆形富士龙散景，边缘有轻微温暖的桶形畸变。一阵微风吹起她的头纱和裙子。她正在对着相机后面的某个人大笑。整个画面散发着欢乐、温暖和自信的美——一个阳光沐浴、充满颗粒感、不完美的完美瞬间。   杰作，最佳质量，杂志大片级新娘摄影，日系胶片美学，富士迫冲颗粒感外观，8K超高清，照片级真实，准确的黄金逆光渲染，半透明头纱的光线透射，逆光下的独立发丝，带有眼角弯曲的自然杜兴微笑，全画面可见胶片颗粒。

prompts.text: Create a cohesive collection of playful icons for [BRAND NAME], a [BRAND TYPE/INDUSTRY] brand. Style should be [STYLE KEYWORDS: e.g., rounded, 3D, flat, hand-drawn, minimal] with a [COLOR STYLE: vibrant, pastel, gradient, monochrome] palette. Use [DESIGN TRAITS: soft shadows, bold outlines, subtle textures, glow, etc.] to give a friendly and modern feel. Maintain consistency across all icons with a unified grid, proportions, and visual language. Icons should represent [LIST OF FEATURES/FUNCTIONS]. Ensure high clarity, balanced spacing, and scalable design suitable for UI, apps, and branding.

items.title: 双重曝光的巅峰体育海报

prompts.text:
Cinematic sports poster, double exposure style, ultra-detailed, high-end editorial design.

A vertical 9:16 cinematic poster featuring a professional elite athlete [character name] from reference image.

The composition shows a powerful full-body athlete standing in the foreground, wearing a modern professional sports uniform designed in team-appropriate colors, with realistic athletic fabric, subtle branding details, and performance wear aesthetics. The athlete is standing confidently on a [SPORT](e.g. football, basketball, or relevant equipment depending on the sport), placed inside a dramatic professional stadium environment at night.

Behind the athlete is a large, cinematic close-up portrait of the same character, seamlessly blended into a double exposure composition. The portrait layer enhances emotional depth, identity, and intensity, creating a powerful visual hierarchy between body and spirit.

---

## 🌍 Background & Environment

The background is a highly stylized sports environment featuring:
- Abstract national or team identity symbolism inspired by the athlete’s country or club (flag shapes, emblems, or cultural motifs)
- Dynamic motion paint splashes that match the team’s primary and secondary color palette
- Energetic light streaks and particle effects to emphasize motion and speed
- A realistic stadium filled with soft crowd bokeh, depth, and atmospheric haze

---

## 💡 Lighting & Atmosphere

The lighting is cinematic and highly dramatic:
- Strong stadium floodlights with high contrast shadows  
- Volumetric lighting beams cutting through mist and rain  
- Atmosphere enriched with moisture particles, rain droplets, or dust in the air  
- Color grading automatically adapted to the team identity (cool, warm, neon, or high-contrast cinematic tone)  
- Ultra-realistic rendering of skin, sweat, fabric texture, and environmental reflections  

---

## 🎨 Visual Style Direction

The overall design follows a premium global sports campaign aesthetic:
- Inspired by high-end athletic branding such as Adidas, Nike, Y-3, and Olympic visual identity systems  
- Editorial magazine cover quality composition  
- Strong emphasis on identity, performance, and emotional intensity  
- Balanced fusion of realism and stylized cinematic enhancement  

---

## 🧩 Typography & Graphic System

Integrated but subtle sports branding elements:
- Visible jersey number on the athlete’s uniform  
- Authentic-looking team or national badge placed on the chest area  
- Bold headline typography integrated into composition (sports editorial style)  
- Subtle multilingual or culturally relevant typographic accents depending on athlete background  
- Minimal sponsor-style branding elements for realism  

---

## 🔥 Mood & Emotion

The overall mood is:
**powerful, elite, focused, emotionally intense, heroic, and representative of national or team pride**

The athlete feels like a global sports icon at the peak of performance, captured in a decisive cinematic moment.

---

## 📸 Final Output Quality

Ultra realistic, 8K resolution, sharp focus, cinematic depth of field, professional sports photography composition, motion energy design, high-end advertising poster quality, globally broadcast sports campaign aesthetic.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
电影级体育海报，双重曝光风格，超精细，高端编辑设计。

一张垂直比例 9:16 的电影级海报，以参考图片中的职业精英运动员 [角色名称] 为特色。

构图展示一位强壮的全身运动员站在前景中，穿着采用适合队伍的颜色设计的现代职业运动服，具有逼真的运动面料、微妙的品牌细节和运动装备美学。运动员自信地站在 [运动项目]（例如足球、篮球，或根据运动项目而定的相关装备）上，置身于夜间极具戏剧性的专业体育场环境中。

在运动员身后是一个巨大的、电影级的同一角色特写肖像，无缝融合到双重曝光构图中。肖像层增强了情感深度、身份认同和强烈感，在身体与精神之间创造了强大的视觉层次感。

---

## 🌍 背景与环境

背景是一个高度风格化的体育环境，特色包括：
- 受运动员所在国家或俱乐部启发的抽象国家或队伍身份象征（旗帜形状、徽章或文化图案）
- 与队伍主次调色板相匹配的动态运动颜料飞溅
- 充满活力的光线条纹和粒子效果，以强调运动和速度
- 一个真实的体育场，充满柔和的人群虚化、深度感和大气薄雾

---

## 💡 光照与氛围

光照具有电影感且极具戏剧性：
- 强烈的体育场泛光灯，带有高对比度阴影  
- 穿透薄雾和雨水的体积光束  
- 充满水分颗粒、雨滴或空气中尘埃的丰富氛围  
- 色彩分级自动适应队伍身份（冷色调、暖色调、霓虹色调或高对比度电影色调）  
- 皮肤、汗水、面料纹理和环境反射的超写实渲染  

---

## 🎨 视觉风格方向

整体设计遵循高端全球体育活动美学：
- 灵感来自阿迪达斯、耐克、Y-3 和奥林匹克视觉识别系统等高端运动品牌  
- 杂志封面质量级别的编辑构图  
- 强烈强调身份、表现和情感强度  
- 现实主义与风格化电影增强的平衡融合  

---

## 🧩 排版与图形系统

融合但微妙的体育品牌元素：
- 运动员制服上可见的球衣号码  
- 位于胸部区域的逼真队伍或国家队徽章  
- 融入构图的粗体标题排版（体育编辑风格）  
- 根据运动员背景采用微妙的多语言或相关文化的排版点缀  
- 极简的赞助商风格品牌元素以增加真实感  

---

## 🔥 情绪与情感

整体情绪为：
**强大、精英、专注、情感强烈、英雄主义，并代表国家或队伍的骄傲**

这位运动员感觉像是一位处于表现巅峰的全球体育偶像，被捕捉在一个决定性的电影时刻。

---

## 📸 最终输出质量

超写实，8K分辨率，锐利对焦，电影景深，专业体育摄影构图，运动能量设计，高端广告海报质量，全球转播体育活动美学。

items.title: 暗黑奇幻阵营群像封面

prompts.text:
Please create a high-completion, high-narrative-tension, series-suitable "Shadow Ensemble Cover" based on [Theme: Write Character Name].

This is not an ordinary character illustration, nor a simple battle poster, but a "ensemble action cover" with a sense of novel cover, comic main visual, game promotional, and dark fantasy illustration. The image needs to combine a giant spiritual core character, multiple mid-ground action characters, background threat elements, local energy light effects, and a blank title area to form a complete character faction and worldview cover.

【Basic Settings】
Theme: [Theme, e.g., Jujutsu Battle / Dark Journey to the West / Cyber Hunter / Shanhai Jing Monster Hunting Squad / Doomsday Survivors / Magic Academy Combat Team]
Work Name: [Work Name]
Series Name / Brand Name: [Brand Name or Series Name]
Subtitle: [Subtitle]
Style Direction: [Style Direction, e.g., Dark Fantasy, Retro Comic Cover, Hand-painted Impasto, Fantasy Novel Cover, Game Main Visual]
Main Color Tone: [Main Color Tone, e.g., Ink Green Black Gray / Deep Blue Neon / Dark Brown Gold Red / Sand Yellow Rust / Deep Purple Gold]
Accent Color: [Accent Color, e.g., Blood Red Energy, Cyan-Green Magic Light, Golden Divine Light, Blue Lightning]
Aspect Ratio: [Aspect Ratio, e.g., 2:3 Vertical / 3:4 Vertical / 4:5 Vertical / 9:16 Vertical]

【Image Structure】
Adopt a vertical cover composition. There must be a massive main visual character in the image, serving as the spiritual core and atmospheric dominant element of the entire image. This character can be a side face, half-body portrait, back view, front gaze, or giant silhouette, occupying the right side, upper side, or main background area of the image, with a calm, mysterious, and oppressive expression, not necessarily participating in combat, but must dominate the atmosphere of the entire image.

Arrange 3 to 6 action characters in the mid-ground to form a combat faction ensemble. There needs to be a clear division of labor and posture differences among the characters, such as charging, holding a knife, casting spells, defending, summoning, jumping, standing guard, ranged attacking, etc. Avoid all characters standing still; a strong action rhythm and visual dynamic line must be formed.

Add enemy threats or worldview elements to the background, such as monsters, giant beasts, villain shadows, mechanical legions, demons, ruins, forests, alien spaces, battlefield smoke, or city disasters. The background threat should not overshadow the main subjects, but should wrap around the characters like shadows, enhancing the sense of crisis and narrative depth.

The image needs to set 1 to 2 high-saturation energy burst points, such as red flame fists, blue lightning, green curse aura, purple magic, golden divine light, or white blade light. Energy light effects should be concentrated on key characters or key weapons to form visual focal points, do not make the entire image glow evenly.

【Composition Method】
The overall structure adopts "Large Spiritual Core Character + Mid-ground Action Ensemble + Background Threat Shadow + Bottom or Side Blank Title Area". The image can use diagonal dynamic lines to organize characters, allowing the character ensemble to move from upper left to lower right, or rush from the bottom to the center, forming a strong sense of propulsion.

Retain an obvious blank title area, recommended to be located at the lower left, bottom, or side of the image. The blank area uses off-white, gray-white, light paper color, or low-saturation background color for placing [Brand Name / Work Name / Subtitle]. The title typography should have a sense of publication cover, using elegant serif fonts, retro title fonts, comic cover titles, or high-end magazine-style layouts. The text area must be clear and not completely obscured by characters and the background.

The edges of the illustration should not be a completely filled rectangle; irregular brush edges, ink diffusion, torn paper blank areas, or natural dissipation can be used, making the characters and background seem to grow out of the paper, enhancing the hand-drawn cover feel and artistic texture.

【Visual Style】
The overall style should be a combination of hand-painted impasto and comic covers, with paper texture, brushstroke feel, dark layer depth, and retro publication temperament. Light and shadow should be mainly low-key dark light, with the background darkened, character outlines clear, and local energy light providing high-contrast focal points. The image should not be overly clean, nor like ordinary smooth AI illustrations; it should retain hand-drawn textures, paper grains, edge brushstrokes, and dark fog.

Color-wise, adopt mainly low-saturation dark tones, supplemented by a small amount of high-saturation energy colors. The overall atmosphere should have a sense of oppression, mystery, combat, and worldview thickness.

【Image Goal】
The final image should look like a mature fantasy novel cover, comic special edition cover, game character faction main visual, or IP promotional poster. It needs to simultaneously possess:
1. A clear main visual character;
2. A character ensemble with action rhythm;
3. Clear enemy threats or worldview background;
4. Strong but restrained energy light effects;
5. A readable title text area;
6. The overall texture of a retro hand-drawn cover.

Please ensure the image information is rich but not chaotic, character hierarchy is clear, visual center of gravity is clear, reading path is natural, and it is suitable for subsequently replacing themes to continue generating works of the same series.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
请根据【主题：写人物名字】创作一张高完成度、高叙事张力、适合系列化发布的「暗潮群像封面 / Shadow Ensemble Cover」。

这不是普通角色插画，也不是简单的战斗海报，而是一张具有小说封面感、漫画主视觉感、游戏宣传感和暗黑奇幻插画感的“群像式动作封面”。画面需要通过一个巨大的精神核心人物、多个中景动作角色、背景威胁元素、局部能量光效和留白标题区，共同构成一个完整的角色阵营与世界观封面。

【基础设定】
主题：【主题，例如咒术战斗 / 暗黑西游 / 赛博猎人 / 山海经猎妖队 / 末日幸存者 / 魔法学院战斗团】
作品名：【作品名】
系列名 / 品牌名：【品牌名或系列名】
副标题：【副标题】
风格方向：【风格方向，例如暗黑奇幻、复古漫画封面、手绘厚涂、奇幻小说封面、游戏主视觉】
主色调：【主色调，例如墨绿黑灰 / 深蓝霓虹 / 暗棕金红 / 沙黄铁锈 / 深紫金色】
点缀色：【点缀色，例如血红能量、青绿色法术光、金色神光、蓝色雷电】
画幅比例：【画幅比例，例如2:3竖版 / 3:4竖版 / 4:5竖版 / 9:16竖版】

【画面结构】
采用竖版封面构图。画面中必须有一个体量巨大的主视觉人物，作为整张图的精神核心和气质压场元素。这个人物可以是侧脸、半身像、背影、正面凝视或巨大轮廓，占据画面右侧、上方或背景主区域，表情冷静、神秘、有压迫感，不一定参与战斗，但必须统领整张图的气质。

在中景安排3到6个动作角色，形成一个战斗阵营群像。角色之间需要有明确分工和姿态差异，例如冲锋、持刀、施法、防御、召唤、跳跃、警戒、远程攻击等。避免所有人物站桩，必须形成强烈的动作节奏和视觉动线。

背景中加入敌方威胁或世界观元素，例如怪物、巨兽、反派阴影、机械军团、妖魔、废墟、森林、异空间、战场烟雾或城市灾难。背景威胁不应喧宾夺主，而应像阴影一样包裹角色，增强危机感和叙事深度。

画面需要设置1到2个高饱和能量爆点，例如红色火焰拳、蓝色雷电、绿色诅咒气息、紫色魔法、金色神光或白色刀光。能量光效应集中在关键角色或关键武器上，形成视觉焦点，不要全画面平均发光。

【构图方式】
整体采用“大型精神核心人物 + 中景动作群像 + 背景威胁阴影 + 底部或侧边留白标题区”的结构。画面可以使用斜向动线组织角色，让角色群像从左上到右下、或从下方冲向中央，形成强烈推进感。

保留一块明显的留白标题区，建议位于左下、底部或画面侧边。留白区域使用米白、灰白、浅纸色或低饱和背景色，用于放置【品牌名 / 作品名 / 副标题】。标题排版应具有出版物封面感，可以使用优雅衬线字体、复古标题字、漫画封面标题或高级杂志式排版。文字区要清晰，不要被角色和背景完全遮挡。

插画边缘不要做成完整矩形铺满，可以使用不规则笔刷边缘、墨迹扩散、撕纸式留白或自然消散的方式，让角色和背景像从纸面中生长出来，增强手绘封面感和艺术质感。

【视觉风格】
整体风格应为手绘厚涂与漫画封面结合，具有纸张质感、笔触感、暗部层次和复古出版物气质。光影以低调暗光为主，背景压暗，人物轮廓清晰，局部能量光提供高对比焦点。画面不要过度干净，不要像普通AI光滑插画，应保留手绘纹理、纸张颗粒、边缘笔触和暗色雾气。

色彩上采用低饱和暗调为主，辅以少量高饱和能量色。整体氛围应具有压迫感、神秘感、战斗感和世界观厚度。

【画面目标】
最终画面应像一张成熟的奇幻小说封面、漫画特别篇封面、游戏角色阵营主视觉或IP宣传海报。它需要同时具备：
1. 清晰的主视觉人物；
2. 有动作节奏的角色群像；
3. 明确的敌方威胁或世界观背景；
4. 强烈但克制的能量光效；
5. 可阅读的标题文字区；
6. 复古手绘封面的整体质感。

请确保画面信息丰富但不混乱，角色层级清晰，视觉重心明确，阅读路径自然，适合后续替换主题继续生成同系列作品。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 复古报纸主角头版设计

prompts.text:
Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic.
The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style.
Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption.
Add realistic newspaper elements:
Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news)
At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, “The Daily Prompts”, “AI Times” or similar - think creatively, according to the picture)
Date, issue number and location
Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography
Small additional articles or captions to the main image
Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality.
Style:
Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper
Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects
Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper
The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper
Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article.
Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1
High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
创作一张以主角为特色的复古报纸最逼真的头版设计。布局应采用真实印刷报纸的风格，并具有电影般的黑白美学。
主照片应显眼地放置在中心，带有画框，就像文章标题中的图片一样。照片中的主体应保持不变，在自然光和略微增加的对比度下清晰可辨，以匹配引人注目的编辑风格。
在顶部创建一个醒目的、吸引眼球的标题（创建一个符合照片精神的独特标题——它可以是浪漫的、神秘的、有趣的或戏剧性的）。在其下方添加一个较小的副标题，看起来就像真实的报纸图片说明。
添加逼真的报纸元素：
小字文本栏（采用无意义占位符文本的风格，但排版像真实新闻一样）
顶部是虚构的出版物名称（例如，“The Daily Prompts”、“AI Times”或类似的——根据图片发挥创意）
日期、期号和地点
装饰线条、分隔线和复古排版
针对主图片的小型附加文章或说明
可选的印章、涂鸦或编辑注释以增加个性。
风格：
黑白或略微褪色的单色纸张
细腻的纸张纹理、颗粒感和墨水瑕疵
模仿真实印刷纸张的小阴影和折痕
整洁但略有磨损的复古报纸美学
情绪：赋予设计个性、表现力和情节，仿佛情节是主要文章的一部分。
宽高比：4:5 或 1:1
高细节、超逼真的编辑摄影与印刷设计的混合体。

items.title: 夏日沙滩气泡水商业摄影

prompts.text:
A professional product photography shot of a cold sparkling water 
can placed upright in golden beach sand. The can is silver and teal, 
covered in realistic water droplets condensation, with a pineapple 
illustration and tropical branding. The can is slightly tilted, 
planted in a small mound of fine golden sand with tiny white pebbles 
and small green tropical leaves/grass scattered around the base. 
Background features a bold split composition - bright sky-blue on 
the left and vivid yellow on the right, with a large blurred real 
pineapple placed behind the can on the right side. A blurred tropical 
palm leaf drapes in from the upper left corner, adding depth and 
framing. Macro-level water condensation droplets visible on the 
can surface. Lighting is bright, vibrant, commercial studio lighting 
with clean shadows. Shallow depth of field - can in sharp focus, 
background softly blurred. Mood: summer, tropical, fresh, refreshing. 
Commercial product photography, ultra-detailed, 8K.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 一罐冰冷气泡水直立放置在金色沙滩中的专业产品摄影照片。罐体呈银色和青色，覆盖着逼真的水滴冷凝，带有菠萝插图和热带品牌标识。罐体略微倾斜，栽种在一个精细金色沙子堆成的小土丘中，底部周围散落着微小的白色卵石和细小的绿色热带树叶/草。背景采用大胆的分屏构图 - 左侧是明亮的天蓝色，右侧是鲜艳的黄色，右侧罐子后面放置着一个大的模糊的真实菠萝。一片模糊的热带棕榈叶从左上角垂入，增加了景深和框架感。罐体表面可见宏观级别的冷凝水滴。照明明亮、充满活力，是具有干净阴影的商业影棚灯光。浅景深 - 罐体清晰对焦，背景柔和模糊。氛围：夏天、热带、清新、清爽。商业产品摄影，超细节，8K。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 地铁车厢抓拍低头看手机女孩

prompts.text: Inside the subway carriage, a young woman sits on a seat near the door, looking down and focused on her phone, showing a natural state, not looking at the camera. She is wearing a gray tight top, a black short skirt, and white sneakers, with long hair falling naturally. The character is located in the right third of the frame, with a blurred foreground obstruction on the left, creating a candid shooting perspective. The door and handrails form clear vertical lines, guiding the line of sight. The overall tone is the cold-toned subway lighting, soft top light, without obvious strong shadows, shallow depth of field makes the subject clear, and the background is slightly blurred. The image has a real camera graininess and a slightly imperfect composition, showing a real moment of a casual snapshot, rather than a posed shot.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 在地铁车厢内，一位年轻女性坐在靠近车门的座位上，低头专注于手机，展现出自然的状态，没有看向镜头。她穿着灰色紧身上衣、黑色短裙和白色运动鞋，长发自然垂落。人物位于画面右侧三分之一的位置，左侧有模糊的前景遮挡，营造偷拍视角。车门与扶手形成清晰的垂直线条，引导视线。整体为冷色调的地铁灯光，柔和的顶光，没有明显的强烈阴影，浅景深使主体清晰，背景略微虚化。画面具有真实相机的颗粒感和轻微不完美的构图，展现随手抓拍的真实瞬间，而非摆拍。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 复古韩风海报密室人像

prompts.text: Create a cinematic portrait based on the reference image: a young man seated on a simple stool inside a narrow room completely covered in vintage Korean pop-culture magazine pages and posters, including the walls, ceiling, and floor. Keep the same centered composition, wide-angle perspective, low camera height, and intimate enclosed-room feeling. The subject sits relaxed with knees apart, hands resting loosely near the lap, looking calmly toward the camera.Preserve the outfit mood: oversized dark charcoal sweatshirt, loose faded blue jeans with subtle knee distressing, clean white sneakers. The room should feel nostalgic, editorial, and slightly surreal, with warm amber overhead lighting, soft shadows, muted colors, and a moody underground music-video atmosphere.Make the magazine-covered surfaces visually dense but organized: layered portraits, Korean headlines, retro advertisements, faded print texture, slight paper wrinkles, taped edges, and varied poster sizes. Keep the background readable as a collage but do not require exact real text; use Korean-inspired typography and graphic blocks without creating recognizable copyrighted magazine covers.Photorealistic, high-detail, cinematic color grading, 35mm film look, subtle grain, realistic skin texture, natural fabric folds, deep perspective lines, symmetrical room geometry, dramatic but soft lighting, 4:5 vertical portrait, production-grade editorial photography.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 基于参考图像创作一幅电影感肖像：一名年轻男子坐在一个简单的凳子上，身处一个狭窄的房间内，该房间的墙壁、天花板和地板完全被复古韩国流行文化杂志页面和海报所覆盖。保持相同的居中构图、广角透视、低机位高度以及亲密的封闭房间感。主体放松地坐着，双膝分开，双手松散地放在大腿附近，平静地看向镜头。保留服装氛围：深炭灰色超大连帽衫，带有细微膝盖磨损的宽松褪色蓝色牛仔裤，干净的白色运动鞋。房间应该让人感到怀旧、具有杂志大片感且略带超现实主义，配有温暖的琥珀色头顶照明、柔和的阴影、柔和的色彩以及情绪化的地下音乐录影带氛围。使被杂志覆盖的表面在视觉上密集但有条理：分层的人物肖像、韩文标题、复古广告、褪色的印刷纹理、轻微的纸张褶皱、用胶带粘贴的边缘以及大小不一的海报。保持背景作为拼贴画的可读性，但不要求使用确切的真实文本；使用受韩文启发的排版和图形色块，而不创建可识别的受版权保护的杂志封面。照片写实，高细节，电影级调色，35毫米胶片质感，细微的颗粒感，逼真的皮肤纹理，自然的布料褶皱，深邃的透视线条，对称的房间几何形状，戏剧性但柔和的照明，4:5竖向肖像，制作级杂志大片摄影。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 重生空间智女的电影海报

prompts.text:
Grounded with the light novel, the Reborn space intelligence woman renders: 
A cinematic movie poster production still. Subjects: Yu Qi, characterised by a calm, piercing intelligence, wearing sharp, minimalist high fashion tailoring; 
Long Hui, characterised by a grounded, protective authority, wearing a structured, charcoal colored suit. 
Setting: A dimly lit, high end urban interior at dusk.Cinematography: Shot on 35mm film stock, low key lighting with a single cool toned directional light casting deep, natural shadows; shallow depth of field blurring the background architecture.Atmosphere: Subtle, refractive geometric light distortions floating in the air, hinting at an advanced, hidden reality.Detailing: Emphasise authentic skin texture and fabric weave rather than digital gloss.Typography: At the bottom, centred, elegant high contrast serif typeface reading 'Reborn: Space Intelligent woman', grounded with a subtle drop shadow to match the prestige aesthetic.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 基于轻小说，重生空间智女渲染：一张电影海报的拍摄剧照。主体：Yu Qi，以冷静、锐利的智慧为特征，穿着利落、极简的高级时尚剪裁；Long Hui，以沉稳、保护性的权威为特征，穿着结构化的炭灰色西装。场景：黄昏时分，一个光线昏暗的高端城市室内环境。摄影：使用35毫米胶片拍摄，低调照明，单束冷色调定向光投射出深邃、自然的阴影；浅景深模糊了背景建筑。氛围：微妙的、折射的几何光线扭曲漂浮在空中，暗示着一个先进的、隐藏的现实。细节：强调真实的皮肤纹理和织物编织，而不是数字光泽。排版：在底部居中，优雅的高对比度衬线字体写着'Reborn: Space Intelligent woman'，带有微妙的投影以匹配高级美学。

items.title: 薄荷绿丝绸睡衣少女沙发自拍

prompts.text:
A captivating, high-quality, full-color, medium-shot selfie of a young woman sitting on a luxurious, light-colored (cream or white) tufted sofa indoors.
The subject is wearing a two-piece silky satin pajama set in a soft mint green
Clothing Details: The top is a bralette style with thin spaghetti straps and a V-neckline. The shorts are low waisted and short, with a delicate lace trim along the hem.
Action/Pose: She is holding a modern smartphone (mint green colored case) with her right hand extended to take the selfie, looking at the camera with a slight, engaging smile. Her left hand is resting lightly on her left thigh. Her legs are crossed or positioned casually. She is curvy yet fit with hour glass figure.
Environment & Mood:
Setting: A bright, airy living space.
Background: A tall window with sheer white curtains, providing natural daylight and soft shadows. A hint of green foliage (trees/bushes) is visible outside the window.
Lighting: Soft, flattering natural light (daylight ambiance).
Style: Fashion-forward, cozy, and luxurious loungewear aesthetic.
Camera Angle: Medium shot, focused on the subject from the waist up.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
一张迷人的、高质量的、全彩色的、中景自拍，一位年轻女子坐在室内一张豪华的浅色（奶油色或白色）簇绒沙发上。
主体穿着一套柔软薄荷绿色的两件式真丝缎面睡衣
服装细节：上衣为胸衣式风格，带有细吊带和V领。短裤为低腰且短小，下摆带有精致的蕾丝镶边。
动作/姿势：她右手伸出拿着一部现代智能手机（薄荷绿色手机壳）来自拍，看着镜头，带着轻微、迷人的微笑。她的左手轻轻放在左大腿上。她的双腿交叉或随意摆放。她曲线优美且身材健美，呈沙漏型身材。
环境与氛围：
场景：一个明亮、通风的生活空间。
背景：一扇带有纯白薄纱窗帘的高大窗户，提供自然光和柔和的阴影。窗外隐约可见绿色植物（树木/灌木）。
光照：柔和、讨喜的自然光（日光氛围）。
风格：前卫时尚、舒适且豪华的居家服美学。

prompts.text:
Quadcopter drone engineering drawing with dimensions, including but not limited to the following contents, remember to put some product concept drawings in the corners

Three-view drawing: front view, top view, left view, using 2D to express 3D structure
Part drawing: draw each part separately, with dimensions, hole positions, materials, tolerances
Assembly drawing: explain how each part is assembled together
Exploded view / exploded assembly drawing: disassemble and arrange the parts to easily see structural relationships
Cross-sectional view: cut open the internal structure for expression
BOM table: bill of materials, specifying part names, quantities, specifications
Dimensional annotation drawing: fully write out the key dimensions needed for manufacturability and replicability

items.title: 奢华酒红高定礼服杂志封面

prompts.text:
A luxury high-fashion magazine cover. Magazine name at the very top in massive elegant serif font reads "LUMIÈRE" — the letters are large, slightly transparent/ghost-style overlapping the model's head just like ELLE magazine, in soft platinum silver color blending into the background.
Character: A young beautiful white woman, early 20s, soft feminine features, big blue eyes, naturally full lips, flawless porcelain skin, subtle makeup — rosy cheeks, nude lips, defined brows. Her hair is platinum blonde, long and wavy, loosely flowing over one shoulder. She looks directly into the camera with a soft yet powerful gaze. Slight tilt of the head, naturally elegant posture.
Outfit: She is wearing a dramatic deep burgundy wine-red ballgown — structured corset top with off-shoulder neckline, voluminous layered satin skirt billowing around her dramatically. Behind her shoulders, large sculptural fabric rises like rose petals — same architectural drama as reference. She leans slightly forward, both hands resting gently on her knees.
Background: Pure soft warm white/ivory background — completely clean, minimal, high-end studio editorial. Soft diffused light, no harsh shadows.
Typography — placed EXACTLY like ELLE magazine reference:
Top: "LUMIÈRE" massive serif, platinum/silver, overlapping model's head slightly
Left mid: "GRACE & POWER" bold serif, then smaller below "THE NEW VISION OF LUXURY"
Right mid: "TIMELESS & FEARLESS" bold, then "PURE OPULENCE" smaller below
Bottom right large: "ICONIC & UNSTOPPABLE" elegant large serif
All text in deep charcoal/dark navy. Font style: classic high fashion serif — same weight, spacing, and elegance as ELLE. Text naturally integrated into the composition, NOT floating randomly.
Ultra photorealistic, 8K, real magazine cover quality, perfect typography placement, vertical 9:13 format.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
一个奢华的高级时尚杂志封面。杂志名称在最顶部以巨大的优雅衬线字体显示为"LUMIÈRE"——字母很大，略微透明/幽灵风格地与模特的头部重叠，就像《ELLE》杂志一样，采用柔和的铂金银色融入背景。
角色：一位年轻美丽的白人女性，20岁出头，柔和的女性特征，蓝色大眼睛，自然丰满的嘴唇，无瑕的瓷白肌肤，淡妆——玫瑰色脸颊，裸色嘴唇，立体的眉毛。她的头发是铂金色的，长而卷曲，松散地垂在一侧肩上。她直视镜头，目光柔和而有力。头部轻微倾斜，姿态自然而优雅。
服装：她穿着一件引人注目的深勃艮第酒红色舞会礼服——带有露肩领口的塑形紧身胸衣上衣，巨大的分层缎面裙摆在她周围戏剧性地飘扬。在她的肩膀后方，巨大的雕塑感面料像玫瑰花瓣一样升起——与参考图具有相同的建筑戏剧性。她微微前倾，双手轻轻放在膝盖上。
背景：纯净柔和的暖白色/象牙色背景——完全干净、极简、高端影棚大片。柔和的漫射光，没有刺眼的阴影。
排版——完全像《ELLE》杂志参考图一样放置：
顶部："LUMIÈRE"巨大衬线体，铂金/银色，略微重叠模特的头部
左中："GRACE & POWER"粗体衬线体，然后下方较小的"THE NEW VISION OF LUXURY"
右中："TIMELESS & FEARLESS"粗体，然后下方较小的"PURE OPULENCE"
右下大字："ICONIC & UNSTOPPABLE"优雅的大号衬线体
所有文字均为深炭色/深海军蓝。字体风格：经典的高级时尚衬线体——与《ELLE》具有相同的粗细、间距和优雅感。文字自然地融入构图中，而不是随机漂浮。
超写实，8K，真实杂志封面质量，完美的排版放置，竖版 9:13 格式。

items.title: 现代极简美食信息图设计

prompts.text: Ultra-clean modern recipe infographic. Showcase [FOOD/DISH] in a visually appealing finished form—sliced, plated, or portioned—floating slightly in perspective or angled view. Arrange ingredients, steps, and tips around the dish in a dynamic editorial layout, not restricted to top-down. Ingredients Section: Include icons or mini illustrations for each ingredient with quantities. Arrange them in clusters, lists, or circular flows connected visually to the dish. Steps Section: Show preparation steps with numbered panels, arrows, or lines, forming a logical flow around the main dish. Include small cooking icons (knife, pan, oven, timer) where helpful. Additional Info (optional): Total calories, prep/cook time, servings, spice level—displayed as clean bubbles or badges near the dish. Visual Style: Editorial infographic meets lifestyle food photography. Vibrant, natural food colors, subtle drop shadows, clean vector icons, modern typography, soft gradients or glassmorphism for step panels. Accent colors can highlight key info (calories, prep time). Composition Guidelines: Finished meal as hero visual (perspective or angled) Ingredients and steps flow dynamically around the dish Clear visual hierarchy: dish > steps > ingredients > optional stats Enough negative space to keep design airy and readable Lighting & Background: Soft, natural studio lighting, minimal textured or gradient background for premium editorial feel. Ultra-crisp, social-feed optimized, no watermark.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text: 超干净的现代食谱信息图。展示[食物/菜品]在视觉上吸引人的成品形式——切片、摆盘或分份——以透视或倾斜视角略微悬浮。以动态的编辑布局在菜品周围安排食材、步骤和技巧，不局限于俯视图。Ingredients Section: 包含每种带有数量的食材的图标或迷你插图。将它们以簇、列表或环形流动的形式排列，在视觉上与菜品相连。Steps Section: 使用带编号的面板、箭头或线条展示准备步骤，围绕主菜形成逻辑流动。在有帮助的地方包含小型烹饪图标（刀、平底锅、烤箱、计时器）。Additional Info (optional): 总卡路里、准备/烹饪时间、份量、辛辣程度——以干净的气泡或徽章形式显示在菜品附近。Visual Style: 编辑信息图与生活方式美食摄影的结合。鲜艳、自然的食物色彩，微妙的投影，干净的矢量图标，现代排版，用于步骤面板的柔和渐变或玻璃拟态。强调色可以突出关键信息（卡路里、准备时间）。Composition Guidelines: 成品餐食作为主视觉（透视或倾斜） 食材和步骤围绕菜品动态流动 清晰的视觉层级：菜品 > 步骤 > 食材 > 可选统计数据 足够的留白以保持设计通透且易读 Lighting & Background: 柔和、自然的演播室灯光，极简的纹理或渐变背景，营造高级编辑感。超清晰，针对社交信息流进行优化，无水印。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 史诗级动画战斗分镜图

prompts.text:
Please generate a high-energy storyboard image in [xx style], featuring [Character A] vs [Character B].

The overall image must be in a 3:4 vertical composition, adopting a 3-column x 4-row layout with a total of 12 storyboard panels, presenting a complete set of continuously progressing animated battle storyboard, rather than an ordinary collage or a collection of single illustrations. The overall style should have a high-energy anime feel, cinematic camera tension, intense action design, and an epic battle atmosphere, like a collection of key frames from an already edited passionate anime trailer. The entire set of images must strictly advance according to the following rhythm:

Panel 1 environment establishment, Panel 2 Character A close-up, Panel 3 Character B close-up, Panel 4 confrontation between both sides, Panel 5 Character A attacks first, Panel 6 Character B counterattacks, Panel 7 close-quarters clash, Panel 8 power escalation, Panel 9 both sides' ultimate moves manifest, Panel 10 final sprint, Panel 11 decisive blow, Panel 12 aftermath of the battle. Each panel must have a clear large white number 1~12 in the top left corner, and each panel must have a white timecode and a concise Chinese description in the bottom left corner. Character A and Character B must maintain a unified appearance, unified clothing, unified abilities, and unified temperament throughout the entire set of 12 panels; if they are well-known characters, their highly recognizable classic images and ability characteristics must be retained; if they are original characters, a distinct design must be automatically generated based on the name and maintained consistently throughout.

The overall must emphasize character contrast, ability contrast, color contrast, and aura contrast, strengthen the sense of speed, sense of burst, sense of impact, energy fission, smoke, debris, and ultimate move special effects, ultimately forming a high-energy anime storyboard image where one can see at a glance the "complete battle process".
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
请生成一张【xx风格】的高燃分镜图，角色为【角色A】vs【角色B】。

整体画面必须为3:4竖版构图，采用3列×4行共12格分镜排版，呈现一整组连续推进的动画式战斗分镜图，而不是普通拼图或单张插画合集。整体风格应具有高燃动画感、电影级镜头张力、强烈动作设计与史诗级战斗氛围，像一支已经剪好的热血动画预告片关键帧合集。整组画面必须严格按照以下节奏推进：

第1格环境建立，第2格角色A特写，第3格角色B特写，第4格双方对峙，第5格角色A先攻，第6格角色B反击，第7格近身交锋，第8格力量升级，第9格双方大招显现，第10格最终冲刺，第11格决胜一击，第12格战后余波。每一格左上角必须有清晰的大号白色编号1~12，每一格左下角必须有白色时间码与一句简洁中文说明。角色A与角色B必须在整组12格中保持外观统一、服装统一、能力统一与气质统一；如果是知名角色，需保留高辨识度的经典形象与能力特征；如果是原创角色，则根据名称自动生成鲜明造型并保持全程一致。

整体必须强调角色对比、能力对比、色彩对比、气场对比，强化速度感、爆发感、冲撞感、能量裂变、烟尘碎石与大招特效，最终形成一张让人一眼看出“完整战斗过程”的高燃动画分镜图。
prompts.label: 中文提示词

items.title: 极简东方美学护肤广告大片

prompts.text:
Minimalist Oriental premium advertising style, high-end skincare brand KV poster, brand name "BRAND", overall aura pure, restrained, fusion of technological sense and Oriental aesthetics

In the center of the image is a high-end essence product, glass bottle body, transparent gradient texture (upper part transparent -> lower part cool-toned cyan-green), with liquid light sense at the bottom, paired with a champagne gold metal bottle cap, the product is placed on a circular highlight base, material is a combination of polished stone and metal, exquisite and clear details, serving as the absolute visual center

The product is surrounded by delicate golden energy halos and flowing light bands, forming a slight S-shaped dynamic line, symbolizing repair and regeneration energy, light diffuses outward from the product, strengthening "visualized efficacy"

An Oriental woman is located in the back-right position of the image, half-body looking back with a side face, calm and elegant temperament, exquisite and natural facial features, cold white delicate skin presenting a transparent luster (emphasizing skincare effects), low-saturation orange-pink makeup, with faint golden highlights

Black long hair flowing with the wind, golden light particles and faint light bands integrated into the hair strands, overall clean and restrained without excessive decoration, forming a echoing relationship with the product's light effects

Wearing translucent silk clothing and a shawl, light and flowing, transparent material, with delicate gold-gilded textures and soft reflections, presenting a premium texture

The lighting system is a clean warm golden main light source (side-rear), the product is the main light focus point, the character is auxiliary light-receiving, edge light is soft, volumetric light is slightly present, tiny golden light particles floating in the air, overall light is transparent without overexposure

The background is a minimalist light-color gradient (cream white + warm gold transition), large area of negative space, the image is clean without impurities, possessing advertising layout space

The bottom of the image adds cool-toned cyan-green water surface or mineral texture elements (symbolizing pure technology and ingredient sources), enhancing the brand's "pure technological sense"

Color system is strictly controlled: main colors are gold + cream white, embellished with cool-toned cyan-green and champagne gold, overall low-saturation premium tone

Composition is stable center composition + slight S-shaped dynamic line, visual focus is clear, hierarchy is clear (product > light > character)

Overall style: high-end, pure, repair and regeneration, anti-aging technological sense, international top-tier skincare advertising texture (similar to La Mer / SK-II level)

Ultra-fine, 8K texture, commercial photography-grade lighting, realistic material representation

Negative: product deformation, text errors, excessive decoration, crowded image, cheap gold, chaotic lighting, overexposure, low clarity
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
极简东方高级广告风格，高端护肤品牌KV海报，品牌名“BRAND”，整体气质纯净、克制、科技感与东方美学融合

画面中心为一款高端精华产品，玻璃瓶身，通透渐变质感（上部透明→下部冷调青绿色），底部带液体光感，搭配香槟金金属瓶盖，产品放置于圆形高光底座之上，材质为抛光石材与金属结合，细节精致清晰，作为视觉绝对中心

产品周围环绕细腻金色能量光环与流动光带，形成轻微S型动线，象征修护与再生能量，光线从产品向外扩散，强化“功效视觉化”

一位东方女性位于画面后方偏右位置，半身回眸侧脸，气质冷静优雅，五官精致自然，冷白细腻肌肤呈现通透光泽（强调护肤效果），低饱和橘粉妆容，带微弱金色高光

黑色长发随风流动，发丝中融合金色光粒与微弱光带，整体干净克制不过度装饰，与产品光效形成呼应关系

身穿半透明丝绸服装与披肩，轻盈流动，材质通透，带细腻鎏金纹理与柔和反光，呈现高级质感

光影系统为干净暖金色主光源（侧后方），产品为主光聚焦点，人物为辅助受光，边缘光柔和，体积光轻微存在，空气中漂浮细小金色光粒，整体光线通透不过曝

背景为极简浅色渐变（米白+暖金过渡），大面积留白，画面干净无杂质，具备广告排版空间

画面下方加入冷调青绿色水面或矿物质质感元素（象征纯净科技与成分来源），增强品牌“纯净科技感”

色彩体系严格控制：主色为金色+米白，点缀冷调青绿色与香槟金，整体低饱和高级色调

构图为稳定中心构图+轻微S型动线，视觉聚焦明确，层级清晰（产品 > 光 > 人物）

整体风格：高端、纯净、修护再生、抗老科技感，国际大牌护肤广告质感（类似La Mer / SK-II级别）

超精细，8K质感，商业摄影级光影，真实材质表现

负面：产品变形，文字错误，过多装饰，画面拥挤，廉价金色，光影混乱，过曝，低清晰度

items.title: 浩瀚无界苹果头显科技海报

prompts.text: Overall Vision: Create a high-end, professionally designed vertical (9:16) tech product marketing poster for the 'Apple Vision Pro'. The entire composition must be visually rich, balanced, and packed with clear information, mirroring the structured layout of a premium DJI-style marketing poster. The background is a deep, dark space-like void with subtle cool blue and silver gradients, seamlessly blending into the informational blocks. All text must be rendered in a clean, bold, modern, professional sans-serif English font. Section 1: Hero Banner (Top): At the top center, the white Apple logo followed by 'Vision Pro' in clean silver text. Below it, the bold main title: 'INFINITE SPACE, BOUNDLESS VISION'. Directly under that, the tagline: 'IMMERSIVE SPATIAL EXPERIENCE. UNLEASH YOUR DESIRE TO EXPLORE.' Below the tagline, a neat row of four circular feature icons with labels: 'micro‑OLED' (Ultra-Clear Display), '180° SPATIAL VIEW' (More Immersive Field of Vision), 'OPTIC ID' (Instant Secure Access), 'EYE TRACKING' (Effortless Precision Control). To the right, a large high-definition dynamic render of the Apple Vision Pro headset at a dramatic angle, studio lit against the dark void background, with the glowing EyeSight display visible on the front. Section 2: Key Specs (Mid-Top): Title: 'POWERFUL PERFORMANCE, REDEFINING SPATIAL EXPERIENCE'. Below the title, five distinct dark rounded feature blocks arranged horizontally. From left to right: '23 MILLION PIXELS' with large 'M²' text over a cinematic virtual cinema thumbnail, caption: 'Finer Rendering of Every Moment'. '180° SPATIAL VIEW' with '180°' text over an immersive spatial panorama thumbnail, caption: 'What is Seen is What is Felt'. '3D SPATIAL AUDIO' with a sound wave spectrum block and 'SPATIAL' text over a concert hall virtual environment thumbnail, caption: 'Professional-Grade Immersive Sound Space'. 'OPTIC ID' with 'Optic ID' text over a crisp security interface thumbnail, caption: 'Instant Access, Always Secure'. 'LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN ~600g' showing a hand holding the Vision Pro headset, caption: 'Wear It With You, Explore As You Wish'. Section 3: Immersion Focus (Center): A large central block. Headline: 'INFINITE SPACE, THE FREEDOM OF BEING ANYWHERE'. A high-detail render of someone wearing the Apple Vision Pro, surrounded by floating virtual screens and spatial windows in a dramatic dark void environment, with a clear central white play button icon as a video indicator. Descriptive text box to the left: 'Integrated spatial computing design provides a safer, more expansive digital experience. Whether exploring virtual worlds, infinite workspaces, or cinematic environments, every session is a new perspective exploration.' Section 4: Display Quality (Mid-Bottom): Title: 'ULTRA-CLEAR SPATIAL DISPLAY, RESTORING TRUE REALITY'. A horizontal split image. Left side: A standard flat screen display showing a mountain and lake scene, labeled 'STANDARD' in a small white tag. Right side: The same scene rendered in stunning micro-OLED spatial depth, dramatically sharper, more vibrant and three-dimensional, labeled 'VISION PRO' in a distinct silver-blue tag. Descriptive text left: 'Equipped with dual micro-OLED displays totaling 23 million pixels, it supports full spatial video and photography, with rich details and true colors, making every frame breathtaking.' Bullet points below: '• 23 MILLION PIXEL micro-OLED DISPLAY', '• DUAL CHIP M2 + R1 PROCESSING', '• 3D SPATIAL VIDEO & PHOTOGRAPHY MODE'. Section 5: Precision Control (Bottom): Title: 'PRECISE EYE TRACKING. CONTROL IS FASTER, ALSO INTUITIVE, AND INCREASINGLY SEAMLESS.' Description: 'Equipped with advanced eye tracking, hand gesture recognition, and voice control technology, utilizing Apple's proprietary algorithms to maintain precise and seamless interaction even in complex spatial environments.' Two comparative interaction thumbnails side-by-side. Left: 'STANDARD CONTROL' with a blurry, cluttered traditional interface shot labeled with a white tag. Right: 'VISION PRO' with a crystal clear, minimal floating spatial interface, labeled with a clean silver-blue tag. Final Aesthetics: The entire poster has a high-tech, ultra-premium dark aesthetic. The Vision Pro headset has subtle silver and blue-tinted glass accents. The EyeSight display on the front glows softly with a warm inner light. All graphics and images are sharp and crisp. The color palette is deep black, cool silver, and subtle electric blue throughout. Clean bottom edge. The overall feeling is that this is the most advanced consumer technology ever created — mysterious, premium, and otherworldly. The price '$3,499' appears subtly in small clean text at the very bottom right corner.

prompts.text: 整体视觉：为“Apple Vision Pro”创建一个高端、专业设计的竖版（9:16）科技产品营销海报。整个构图必须在视觉上丰富、平衡，并充满清晰的信息，映照出高端大疆风格营销海报的结构化布局。背景是一个深邃、黑暗的类似太空的虚空，带有微妙的冷蓝色和银色渐变，无缝融入信息块中。所有文本必须以干净、粗体、现代、专业的无衬线英文字体渲染。第1部分：主横幅（顶部）：在顶部中心，白色苹果标志后跟干净的银色文本“Vision Pro”。在其下方，粗体主标题：“INFINITE SPACE, BOUNDLESS VISION”。正下方是标语：“IMMERSIVE SPATIAL EXPERIENCE. UNLEASH YOUR DESIRE TO EXPLORE.”。在标语下方，是一排整齐的四个圆形功能图标及标签：“micro‑OLED”（超清显示）、“180° SPATIAL VIEW”（更沉浸的视野）、“OPTIC ID”（即时安全访问）、“EYE TRACKING”（轻松精准控制）。右侧是一个大型高清动态渲染的Apple Vision Pro头显，呈戏剧性角度，在黑暗虚空背景下进行工作室打光，正面可见发光的EyeSight显示屏。第2部分：关键规格（中上部）：标题：“POWERFUL PERFORMANCE, REDEFINING SPATIAL EXPERIENCE”。在标题下方，五个独特的深色圆角功能块水平排列。从左到右：“23 MILLION PIXELS”，在电影感虚拟电影院缩略图上有大号“M²”文本，说明文字：“每一刻的更精细渲染”。“180° SPATIAL VIEW”，在沉浸式空间全景缩略图上有“180°”文本，说明文字：“所见即所感”。“3D SPATIAL AUDIO”，带有声波频谱块和在音乐厅虚拟环境缩略图上的“SPATIAL”文本，说明文字：“专业级沉浸式声音空间”。“OPTIC ID”，在清晰的安全界面缩略图上有“Optic ID”文本，说明文字：“即时访问，始终安全”。“LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN ~600g”，展示一只手拿着Vision Pro头显，说明文字：“随身佩戴，随心探索”。第3部分：沉浸焦点（中心）：一个大型中央块。大标题：“INFINITE SPACE, THE FREEDOM OF BEING ANYWHERE”。一个高细节渲染的人物佩戴Apple Vision Pro，在戏剧性的黑暗虚空环境中被漂浮的虚拟屏幕和空间窗口包围，带有清晰的中央白色播放按钮图标作为视频指示器。左侧描述性文本框：“集成空间计算设计提供更安全、更广阔的数字体验。无论是探索虚拟世界、无限工作空间还是电影级环境，每一次体验都是一次全新的视角探索。”第4部分：显示质量（中下部）：标题：“ULTRA-CLEAR SPATIAL DISPLAY, RESTORING TRUE REALITY”。一个水平分割图像。左侧：一个标准的平面屏幕显示器显示山湖场景，用小白色标签标记为“STANDARD”。右侧：同一场景以令人惊叹的micro-OLED空间深度渲染，明显更清晰、更生动、更立体，用独特的银蓝色标签标记为“VISION PRO”。左侧描述性文本：“配备总计2300万像素的双micro-OLED显示屏，支持完整的空间视频和摄影，细节丰富、色彩真实，让每一帧都令人惊叹。”下方的项目符号：“• 23 MILLION PIXEL micro-OLED DISPLAY”，“• DUAL CHIP M2 + R1 PROCESSING”，“• 3D SPATIAL VIDEO & PHOTOGRAPHY MODE”。第5部分：精准控制（底部）：标题：“PRECISE EYE TRACKING. CONTROL IS FASTER, ALSO INTUITIVE, AND INCREASINGLY SEAMLESS.”。描述：“配备先进的眼动追踪、手势识别和语音控制技术，利用苹果专有算法，即使在复杂的空间环境中也能保持精准无缝的交互。”两个并排的比较交互缩略图。左侧：“STANDARD CONTROL”，带有模糊、杂乱的传统界面镜头，用白色标签标记。右侧：“VISION PRO”，带有水晶般清晰、极简的浮动空间界面，用干净的银蓝色标签标记。最终美学：整张海报具有高科技、超高端的暗黑美学。Vision Pro头显具有微妙的银色和蓝色调玻璃点缀。正面的EyeSight显示屏散发出柔和的温暖内部光芒。所有图形和图像都清晰锐利。整个色调为深黑色、冷银色和微妙的电光蓝色。干净的底部边缘。整体感觉这是有史以来最先进的消费技术——神秘、高端、超凡脱俗。价格“$3,499”在右下角以干净的小字体微妙地出现。

items.title: 红楼林黛玉史诗叙事海报

prompts.text:
Automatically generate a collector's edition epic narrative poster based on {Dream of the Red Chamber},

A giant and elegant side-profile silhouette of {Lin Daiyu} serves as the outer contour, inside which automatically grows the complete worldview, iconic scenes, character relationships, symbolic elements, key architecture, creatures, props, and atmosphere that best fit the theme.

The overall design is not an ordinary collage, but a high-end silhouette contour-filled narrative composite, featuring double-exposure-like associations, yet intensified into cinematic narrative expression and spatial staging.

Movie poster style + Oriental realism aesthetic fusion, emphasizing realistic physical light and shadow, cinematic language, spatial depth, and narrative hierarchy.

The lighting adopts cinematic side-backlighting with local warm light accents, the cold-warm contrast is restrained and realistic, adding volumetric light and light mist to enhance the sense of space.

The materials are represented with realistic textures (architecture, silk, skin, stone), avoiding a purely painted brushstroke feel,

Retaining soft aerial perspective, but optimized into cinematic depth of field and focus control.

Slight film grain, edge blank-keeping and brush strokes are changed to cinematic soft blending transitions,

Large areas of negative space, restrained and high-end layout, quiet, grand, restrained, Oriental cinematic narrative with a strong sense of fatalism.

All elements must be strongly bound to the theme, recognizable at a glance, no clutter, no hard collage, no templated backgrounds, no cheap fantasy assets.
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
根据{红楼梦}自动生成一张 收藏版史诗叙事海报，

巨大优雅的{林黛玉}人物侧脸剪影作为外轮廓，剪影内部自动生长出最契合该主题的完整世界观、标志性场景、角色关系、象征符号、关键建筑、生物、道具与氛围。

整体不是普通拼贴，而是高级的剪影轮廓填充式叙事合成，带有双重曝光式联想，但强化为电影级叙事表达与空间调度。

电影海报风格 + 东方现实主义美学融合，强调真实物理光影、镜头语言、空间纵深与叙事层级。

光影采用电影级侧逆光与局部暖光点缀，冷暖对比克制真实，加入体积光与轻雾增强空间感。

材质表现为真实质感（建筑、丝绸、肌肤、石材），避免纯绘画笔触感，

保留柔和空气透视，但优化为电影级景深与焦点控制。

轻微胶片颗粒，边缘飞白与刷痕改为电影式柔和融合过渡，

大面积留白，版式克制高级，安静、宏大、克制、宿命感强的东方电影叙事。

所有元素必须强绑定主题，一眼识别，不要杂乱，不要硬拼贴，不要模板化背景，不要廉价奇幻素材。

prompts.text:
Please create an anime promotional image in the style of an "Otome romance game main visual poster" [Theme: ].
Overall setting: Multiple male characters with a strong sense of power, leader aura, and mature charm surround a female protagonist, unfolding a Shura field relationship intertwined with emotion and political maneuvering. The image is not an ordinary group portrait, but a typical official KV poster for a female-oriented romance mobile game: all male characters approach the female protagonist from different directions, forming complex tensions such as protection, gazing, possessiveness, restrained deep affection, and dangerous ambiguity. The female protagonist is located at the visual center, with a smart, calm, and elegant temperament, acting both as a core diplomatic figure and the only female protagonist in an otome game who captivates everyone.
Art style requirements: High-finish Japanese anime illustration, female-oriented mobile game card texture, aesthetic, gorgeous, dreamy, exquisite, cinematic lighting and shadows, soft focus, lens flare, starlight particles, floating petals, delicate skin texture, exquisite hair strands, high-end clothing, facial expressions with dramatic tension.
Composition requirements: Vertical poster composition, a mix of half-body and close-up shots of characters, the female protagonist is centered, other male characters surround from top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right and other directions, forming a sense of visual encirclement and emotional oppression; there are clear sightline relationships between the characters, and all emotions are focused on the female protagonist.
Background requirements: Palace, council chamber, metaphorical space for international situations, power center, symbolic environment of war and order, but the overall treatment should be romanticized and fantasized, not made into real news photos, but made into a dramatic romance game worldview background.
Typography requirements: Add Chinese game poster copywriting into the image, including main title, subtitle, character names, CV text, character dialogue, Chinese text for "Pre-registration open", and app store style buttons. The overall typography should look like a mobile game promotional poster before official launch, with exquisite and unified design, not cluttered.

prompts.text:
请创作一张【主题为：】的“乙女恋爱游戏主视觉海报”风格的二次元宣传图。

整体设定为：多位具有强烈权力感、领袖气场、成熟魅力的男性角色，围绕一位女性主角展开情感与权谋交织的修罗场关系。画面不是普通群像，而是典型女性向恋爱手游的官方KV海报：所有男性角色从不同方向靠近女主，形成守护、凝视、占有欲、克制深情、危险暧昧等复杂张力。女主位于视觉中心，气质聪慧、冷静、优雅，既像外交核心人物，又像乙女游戏中让所有人倾心的唯一女主。

画风要求：高完成度日系二次元插画，女性向手游卡面质感，唯美、华丽、梦幻、精致，电影级光影，柔焦，镜头光晕，星光粒子，漂浮花瓣，细腻皮肤质感，精致发丝，服装高级，面部神情有戏剧张力。

构图要求：竖版海报构图，人物半身到近景特写混合，女主居中，其他男性角色从左上、右上、左下、右下等方位围拢，形成视觉包围感与情绪压迫感；人物彼此之间有明确视线关系，所有情绪都聚焦在女主身上。

背景要求：宫殿、议事厅、国际局势隐喻空间、权力中心、战争与秩序的象征性环境，但整体处理要浪漫化、幻想化，不要做成真实新闻照片，而是做成戏剧化的恋爱游戏世界观背景。

排版要求：画面中加入中文游戏海报文案，包括大标题、副标题、角色名字、CV字样、人物台词、预约开启中文字样，以及应用商店风格按钮。整体排版像正式上线前的手游宣传海报，设计精致统一，不能杂乱。

items.title: 滴落墨水的复古绅士

prompts.text:
Subject & Composition:

Central Figure: A sharp profile view of a man wearing a classic 1940s fedora and a formal suit.

Melting Effect: The lower half of the man's torso should dissolve or "drip" into long, vertical black ink streaks and splatters, creating a surreal, liquid-bleed effect against the background.

Graphic Element: A large, solid vibrant red circle is positioned directly behind the man's head and shoulders, creating a "halo" or "rising sun" motif that anchors the composition.

Style & Color Palette:

Color Scheme: A strict minimalist palette of True Red, Deep Black, and Off-White/Cream.

Photography Style: High-contrast, black and white film noir photography for the subject. The texture should look like a high-resolution fashion editorial with a shallow depth of field.

Background: A clean, slightly textured off-white paper or canvas background to give it a premium, physical poster feel.

Technical Details:

Lighting: Strong "Rembrandt" lighting to define the facial contours, emphasizing the bridge of the nose and the jawline with deep shadows.

Atmosphere: Somber, intellectual, and high-stakes. The design should feel modern yet period-accurate to the mid-20th century.

Framing: Vertical poster orientation (A-frame), with significant negative space on the left and right to emphasize the central vertical axis.

Aspect ratio is 9:16

prompts.text:
Subject & Composition:

Central Figure: 一个男人的清晰侧面轮廓，戴着经典的20世纪40年代软呢帽，穿着正式西装。

Melting Effect: 男人躯干的下半部分应该溶解或“滴落”成细长、垂直的黑色墨水条纹和飞溅物，在背景上创造出一种超现实的、液体渗色效果。

Graphic Element: 一个大的、实体的鲜艳红色圆圈直接放置在男人的头部和肩膀后方，创造出一种“光环”或“旭日”的图案，以此锚定构图。

Style & Color Palette:

Color Scheme: 一种严格的极简主义调色板，包含正红色、深黑色和米白色/奶油色。

Photography Style: 主体采用高对比度的黑白黑色电影摄影风格。纹理应该看起来像高分辨率的时尚大片，具有浅景深。

Background: 干净、略带纹理的米白色纸张或画布背景，赋予其高级的、实体海报的质感。

Technical Details:

Lighting: 强烈的“伦勃朗”灯光来勾勒面部轮廓，用深阴影强调鼻梁和下颌线。

Atmosphere: 阴郁、理智且高风险。设计应该感觉现代，同时精准符合20世纪中期的时代特征。

Framing: 垂直海报方向（A字型），左右两侧有大量留白，以强调中心垂直轴。

Aspect ratio is 9:16

items.title: 西门庆的一天百宫格分镜

prompts.text:
100-grid storyboard frame of Ximen Qing game, 10×10 grid layout, 1:1 square aspect ratio.

【Grid Layout】
100 equal-sized square grids, strictly arranged in 10 rows and 10 columns, even spacing between grids, professional game storyboard style.

【Story Content】
Telling the complete day of the wealthy Ming Dynasty merchant Ximen Qing, from dawn to late night:
Grids 1-10: Waking up at dawn, luxury mansion bedroom, washing and dressing
Grids 11-20: Ancestral hall sacrifice, feeding fish in the courtyard, tasting tea and reading newspapers
Grids 21-30: Family breakfast, reunion with wife and children, happy and harmonious
Grids 31-40: Managing accounts in the study, steward reporting, preparing to go out
Grids 41-50: Traveling by sedan chair, bustling street market, heading to the shop
Grids 51-60: Pharmacy business, inspecting medicinal herbs, receiving customers
Grids 61-70: Silk warehouse, inspecting goods and bargaining, signing contracts and trading
Grids 71-80: Visiting officials, giving gifts and playing chess, collusion between officials and businessmen
Grids 81-90: Tea house elegant gathering, listening to music and appreciating paintings, socializing with literati
Grids 91-100: Returning home at sunset, family banquet reunion, lighting lamps and going to bed

【Visual Style】
Cinematic realistic style, high restoration of Ming Dynasty history, exquisite clothing and prop details, dramatic lighting and shadow, alternating between long shots, medium shots, close-up detail shots.

【Color Tone】
Dawn: Cold blue tone, pale gold
Daytime: Warm yellow, emerald green, vermilion
Dusk: Orange red, purple clouds
Night: Deep blue, lantern red, moonlight silver

【Technical Requirements】
High resolution, each grid is of game CG-level quality, professional and diverse composition, accurate research on Ming Dynasty architecture, clothing, and props.

prompts.text:
西门庆游戏的100宫格分镜画面，10×10网格布局，1:1正方形画幅。

【网格布局】
100个等大的正方形格子，严格10行10列排列，格子间距均匀，专业游戏分镜风格。

【故事内容】
讲述明代富商西门庆完整的一天，从黎明到深夜：
第1-10格：破晓醒来，豪宅卧室，洗漱更衣
第11-20格：祠堂祭祖，庭院喂鱼，品茶看报
第21-30格：家族早餐，妻儿团聚，其乐融融
第31-40格：书房理账，管家汇报，准备出门
第41-50格：乘轿出行，繁华街市，前往商铺
第51-60格：药铺生意，检查药材，接待客户
第61-70格：丝绸仓库，验货议价，签约交易
第71-80格：拜访官员，送礼下棋，官商勾结
第81-90格：茶楼雅集，听曲赏画，文人应酬
第91-100格：夕阳归家，家宴团圆，掌灯就寝

【视觉风格】
电影级写实风格，明代历史高度还原，精致的服饰道具细节，戏剧性光影，远景中景特写细节镜头交替。

【色彩基调】

items.title: 小红书手绘照片注释风

prompts.text:
Please observe the elements in the photo, and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations for each element.
【Elements in the picture】
Simply list the items in the photo (for example: iced Americano, bread, by the window, sunlight)
【Drawing requirements】
- Use white thin lines, like a hand-drawn pen
- One-stroke style, lines should be a bit casual, not too neat
- Lightly trace a circle of outline along the edge of the object
- Appropriately add arrows / dashed lines to guide the line of sight
【Text style】
- Chinese handwritten feel, a bit more colloquial
- Sentences should be short, like casually written ones
- Tone like daily murmurs / little emotions
【How to write the content】
- Drinks -> taste / temperature / current feeling (example: icy, so refreshing)
- Food -> texture / whether it is delicious or not (example: soft, a bit of a surprise)
- Environment -> atmosphere (example: a bit quiet, very suitable for zoning out)
- Overall -> a one-sentence summary (example: today counts as being healed too)
【Small decorations】
- Can add a little bit: heat vapor, little stars, hearts, simple expressions (for example: :))
- Don't add too much, leaving some blank space looks better
【Overall feeling】
- Like Xiaohongshu daily sharing / casual recording
- Natural, doesn't need to be too exquisite, has a bit of a relaxed feeling
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
请观察照片中的元素，并为每个元素添加有意义的手绘注释。
【画面里的东西】
把照片里的物品简单列出来（比如：冰美式、面包、窗边、阳光）
【画法要求】
・用白色细线，像手绘笔一样
・一笔画风格，线条随意一点，不要太工整
・沿着物体边缘轻轻描一圈轮廓
・适当加箭头 / 虚线，引导视线
【文字风格】
・中文手写感，偏口语一点
・句子要短，像随手写的
・语气像日常碎碎念 / 小情绪
【内容怎么写】
・饮品 → 味道 / 温度 / 当下感觉（例：冰冰的，好清爽）
・食物 → 口感 / 好不好吃（例：软软的，有点惊喜）
・环境 → 氛围（例：有点安静，很适合发呆）
・整体 → 一句总结（例：今天也算被治愈了）
【小装饰】
・可以加一点点：热气、小星星、爱心、简单表情（比如：:)）
・不要太多，留一点空白更好看
【整体感觉】
・像小红书日常分享 / 随手记录
・自然、不用太精致，有点松弛感

items.title: 照片上的手写英语单词笔记

prompts.text:
[Task Objective]
Identify 5 objects in the photo, and add for each object:

1. English word
2. Simple English definition
3. Optional short example sentence

[Number of Annotations]

* Only mark 5 objects
* Do not exceed 5
* Prioritize common, easy-to-learn objects from daily life
* If there are many objects in the picture, only pick the 5 most typical ones

[Drawing Style Requirements]

* Use white thin line hand-drawn style for annotations
* Lines should look casually drawn, with a single-stroke feel
* Lightly trace a circle of outline along the edge of the object
* Can add a small number of arrows and dashed lines to assist in pointing
* Do not make it too neat, maintain a natural and relaxed feel
* Do not fill the picture, keep white space

[Text Format]
Write next to each object:

* English word
* A simple English explanation
* An optional short example sentence

Reference format:

coffee
a drink you can have in the morning
Example: I drink coffee every day.

bread
soft food made from flour
Example: I had bread for breakfast.

[Text Style]

* Mainly in English
* Explanations should be simple, suitable for beginners
* Do not write like a dictionary
* More like small notes for learning words from pictures
* Words should be more prominent, explanations and example sentences slightly smaller

[Overall Vibe]

* Like handwritten English learning annotations on daily photos
* Clean, natural, with white space
* Like light learning content on social media
* Not too complex, not too full, not too decorative

[Output Focus]
The focus is:
Only select 5 objects → label English words → pair with simple usage explanations → make the whole picture look relaxed and natural.

Make the aspect ratio 9:16
prompts.label: 英文提示词

prompts.text:
【任务目标】
在照片中识别 5 个物品，并为每个物品添加：

1. 英文单词
2. 简单英文释义
3. 可选的简短例句

【标注数量】

* 只标记 5 个物品
* 不要超过 5 个
* 优先选择日常生活中常见、容易学习的物品
* 如果画面里物品很多，只挑最典型的 5 个

【画法要求】

* 用白色细线手绘风格标注
* 线条像随手画上去的，一笔画感
* 沿着物体边缘轻轻描一圈轮廓
* 可以加少量箭头、虚线辅助指向
* 不要太工整，保持自然松弛感
* 不要把画面画满，保留留白

【文字格式】
每个物品旁边写：

* 英文单词
* 一句简单英文解释
* 可选一句简短例句

参考格式：

coffee
a drink you can have in the morning
Example: I drink coffee every day.

bread
soft food made from flour
Example: I had bread for breakfast.

【文字风格】

* 以英文为主
* 解释要简单，适合初学者
* 不要写得像词典
* 更像看图学单词的小笔记
* 单词更突出，解释和例句稍小一点

【整体感觉】

* 像日常照片上的英语学习手写注释
* 清爽、自然、有留白
* 像社交媒体上的轻学习内容
* 不要太复杂，不要太满，不要太装饰化

【输出重点】
重点是：
只选 5 个物品 → 标英文单词 → 配简单用法解释 → 让整张图看起来轻松自然。

Make the aspect ratio 9:16

items.title: iX未来科技品牌设计套件

prompts.text:
Create a polished multi-page brand kit for a company called iX, where each page functions as a dedicated product showcase featuring a different high-tech gadget.
The brand should feel playful, futuristic, vibrant, and design-forward, blending the energy of a toy-inspired product with the sophistication of a premium creative tech brand. Use a bold, experimental visual identity with bright color, clean geometry, modern typography, dynamic motion cues, and slightly surreal imagery.
For each image, spotlight a unique, inventive gadget—such as futuristic wearables, tactile audio devices, or surreal home-tech—presented in an editorial, product-focused layout. The overall mood should feel inventive, youthful, rhythmic, and high-concept, balancing fun consumer culture with fashion-like presentation. Include a sense of product obsession through close-up visual experimentation, innovative packaging exploration, and cross-platform application. Make it feel like a confident, contemporary brand world that is both accessible and art-directed, with strong graphic cohesion and a premium creative-studio aesthetic.

prompts.text:
为一家名为 iX 的公司制作一份精致的多页品牌套件，其中每一页都作为一个专属的产品展示，展示一款不同的高科技小工具。
该品牌应感觉俏皮、未来主义、充满活力且具有设计前瞻性，将玩具启发产品的能量与高端创意科技品牌的精致感相融合。使用大胆、实验性的视觉识别，具有明亮的色彩、简洁的几何形状、现代的排版、动态的运动暗示和略带超现实主义的意象。
对于每张图像，聚焦一款独特、富有创意的小工具——例如未来主义的可穿戴设备、触觉音频设备或超现实的家庭科技产品——以编辑化、以产品为中心的版式呈现。整体氛围应感觉富有创意、年轻、有节奏感且具有高概念，在有趣的消费文化与时尚般的呈现之间取得平衡。通过特写的视觉实验、创新的包装探索和跨平台应用，包含一种对产品的痴迷感。让它感觉像一个自信、当代的品牌世界，既平易近人又具有艺术指导感，具有强烈的图形凝聚力和高端创意工作室的美学。

items.title: 濒危动物科普信息图设计

prompts.text: Create a visually rich infographic in Chinese about an endangered animal. Start by finding one online, research its habitat, diet, and unique traits. Present information through annotated visuals and structured callouts, not generic sections. Style it like a bold graphic illustration: a detailed, photorealistic central animal as the focal point, supported by diagrams, callouts, and concise text elements. Use clean backgrounds and a mix of photorealism with strong graphic elements (shapes, icons, color blocking) in a layered composition. Make it dense, tactile, and professionally authored.

prompts.text: 创建一个关于濒危动物的中文视觉丰富信息图。首先在网上找一个，研究它的栖息地、饮食和独特特征。通过带注释的视觉元素和结构化的标注来呈现信息，而不是通用的部分。风格要像大胆的图形插画：一个详细的、逼真的中心动物作为焦点，由图表、标注和简洁的文本元素支持。使用干净的背景，并在分层构图中混合使用逼真效果与强烈的图形元素（形状、图标、色块）。使其密集、有触感且专业制作。
